34063.authors: Michael D. Bordo, Oliver Bush, Ryland Thomas
34063.abstract: Discussion of the causes of the Great Inflation in the UK during the 1970s has centred around the relative importance of two potential explanations, which we label “bad luck” – the occurrence of unusually large commodity price and supply-side shocks - and “bad policy” reflecting failures in both monetary and prices and incomes policies. By reconsidering the historical and empirical record of inflation from 1950s to the early 1990s we show that the persistence of the Great Inflation in the UK cannot fully be explained by these factors, although these can account for some of the major fluctuations. Instead, underlying inflation and inflation expectations appear to be the result of a sequence of regime shifts. We argue those regime shifts are as much related to fundamental changes in fiscal policy as they are to monetary policy and union reforms. Our empirical evidence suggests that fiscal policy was at the heart of many of the problems in the UK during the Great Inflation. In contrast to most of British history, it was not used to stabilise the public finances. Instead, it was used to keep unemployment down and growth up, to subsidise losers from terms of trade shocks and to secure deals with the unions.

34038.title: Matching-Gift Incentives and Blood Donation: Linking Local and Global Altruism
34038.zh_title: 配捐激励与献血：连接本地与全球利他主义
34038.authors: Gary Charness, Ramon Cobo-Reyes, Nicola Lacetera, Juan A. Lacomba, Francisco Lagos, Mario Macis, Juliette Milgram-Baleix, María José Ruiz-Martos
34038.abstract: We conducted a large-scale field experiment in Granada, Spain, to assess the motivating effect on blood donation of matching each attempt to donate with a charitable contribution pledge for children in developing countries. The intervention involved 344 blood drives and 21,888 participants. Compared to a control condition with no pledges, the pro-social incentives significantly increased blood donation rates by approximately 5% on average. Offering a day or a week’s worth of food for vulnerable populations led to the largest and most robust increases in donations, and repeated exposure to incentives had a reinforcing effect on subsequent donation behavior, especially for individuals who previously donated when incentivized. An auxiliary survey examining the perceived importance and motivational impact of food-related incentives corroborates our findings. Our results suggest that coordination between blood donation campaigns and humanitarian aid programs could enhance the blood supply at minimal additional cost. More broadly, policymakers and nonprofit organizations can align global and local altruism by linking humanitarian assistance with initiatives promoting civic engagement and public health.
34038.zh_abstract: 我们在西班牙格拉纳达进行了一项大规模实地实验，以评估将每次献血尝试与为发展中国家儿童提供慈善捐款承诺相匹配对献血的激励效果。干预涉及344场献血活动和21,888名参与者。与没有承诺的对照组相比，亲社会激励平均显著提高了约5%的献血率。为弱势群体提供一天或一周的食物导致最大且最稳健的献血增加，并且反复接触激励对后续献血行为产生了强化效应，特别是对于之前在有激励时献过血的个人。一项考察食物相关激励感知重要性和激励影响的辅助调查证实了我们的发现。我们的结果表明，献血活动与人道主义援助项目之间的协调可以以最小的额外成本增加血液供应。更广泛地说，政策制定者和非营利组织可以通过将人道主义援助与促进公民参与和公共卫生的倡议联系起来，来协调全球和本地的利他主义。

34037.title: Government Monitoring of Health Care Quality: Evidence from the Nursing Home Sector
34037.zh_title: 政府对医疗质量的监控：来自养老院行业的证据
34037.abstract: In contracting out, monitoring is an important policy tool to extract information on firm quality and incentivize quality provision. This paper examines a central quality inspection of nursing homes, a sector with significant welfare implications but widespread public concerns about the quality of care. Using data on nursing homes across the US, we find that nursing homes exhibit strategic responses to the inspection in multiple core dimensions. Nursing homes increase the quantity and quality of labor inputs, reduce admissions, increase temporary discharges, and improve patient care in response to the inspection. However, nearly all responses drop immediately once the inspection is completed. While inspection ratings are unlikely to reflect nursing homes’ absolute quality given the strategic responses, we find that they nonetheless predict nursing homes’ relative quality: using a quasi-experimental research design, we find that staying at higher-rated nursing homes lowers patient mortality. Finally, we examine the role of the inspection in incentivizing sustained nursing home quality improvements through quality deficiency citations, finding mixed effects.
34037.zh_abstract: 在合同外包中，监控是提取企业质量信息并激励质量提供的重要政策工具。本文考察了对养老院的中央质量检查，这是一个具有重大福利影响但护理质量普遍受到公众关注的行业。利用美国各地养老院的数据，我们发现养老院在多个核心维度上对检查表现出战略性反应。养老院增加劳动力投入的数量和质量，减少入院人数，增加临时出院人数，并改善患者护理以应对检查。然而，几乎所有反应在检查完成后立即消失。尽管鉴于这些战略性反应，检查评级不太可能反映养老院的绝对质量，但我们发现它们仍然预测了养老院的相对质量：使用准实验研究设计，我们发现入住评级较高的养老院会降低患者死亡率。最后，我们通过质量缺陷引用检查在激励养老院持续质量改进方面的作用，发现了混合效应。

34036.title: Rounding up the Effect of Tariffs on Financial Markets: Evidence from April 2, 2025
34036.zh_title: 关税对金融市场影响的取整效应：来自2025年4月2日的证据
34036.abstract: We measure the response of financial outcomes to the US announcement on April 2, 2025, of tariffs on nearly all its trading partners. To address the challenge posed by potential anticipation by economic agents, we decompose these tariffs into a component associated with bilateral deficits and an arguably unanticipated component resulting from the rounding up of the continuous deficit measure to the next whole number or to the baseline 10% rate. We measure the short-term response of stock prices and exchange rates, focusing on all countries with which the US has a bilateral deficit. For both outcomes, the round-up component’s effect is an order of magnitude larger than that of the deficit component. We find that a one percentage point higher tariff is associated with a statistically significant 0.23% decline in stock prices. Further, we find no evidence of a dollar appreciation; if anything, higher tariffs are associated with a dollar depreciation, driven by countries with a floating regime. We show this is consistent with a model that allows for trade reallocation and in which exports to the US are invoiced in dollars while exports to the rest of the world are partly invoiced in producer currency.
34036.zh_abstract: 我们衡量了金融市场结果对美国于2025年4月2日宣布对几乎所有贸易伙伴征收关税的反应。为应对经济主体可能预期这一挑战，我们将这些关税分解为与双边赤字相关的部分，以及由于将连续赤字指标向上取整到下一个整数或基线10%税率而产生的、可以说是未预期的部分。我们衡量了股票价格和汇率的短期反应，重点关注美国与之存在双边赤字的所有国家。对于这两个结果，取整部分的影响比赤字部分的影响大一个数量级。我们发现，关税每提高一个百分点，股票价格就会显著下降0.23%。此外，我们没有发现美元升值的证据；相反，更高的关税与美元贬值相关，这主要是由实行浮动汇率制度的国家推动的。我们表明，这与一个允许贸易重新分配且对美出口以美元计价而对世界其他地区出口部分以生产者货币计价的模型是一致的。

34035.title: Adaptive Priority Mechanisms
34035.abstract: How should authorities that care about match quality and diversity allocate resources in the face of uncertainty? We introduce adaptive priority mechanisms (APM) that prioritize agents based on their scores and characteristics. We show that APM uniquely implement the ex post optimal allocation. The ubiquitous priority and quota mechanisms are optimal if and only if the authority is risk-neutral or extremely risk-averse over diversity, respectively. Deferred Acceptance implements the unique stable matching when all authorities use the optimal APM. We provide a practical roadmap for implementing APM as a market-design solution and illustrate this using Chicago Public Schools data.
34035.zh_abstract: 关心匹配质量和多样性的当局应如何在不确定性下分配资源？我们引入了自适应优先级机制（APM），该机制根据代理人的分数和特征对其进行优先排序。我们证明，APM唯一地实现了事后最优分配。当且仅当当局对多样性风险中性或极度风险厌恶时，普遍存在的优先级和配额机制分别是最优的。当所有当局都使用最优APM时，延迟接受机制实现了唯一的稳定匹配。我们提供了将APM作为市场设计解决方案实施的实用路线图，并使用芝加哥公立学校的数据进行了说明。

34034.title: The Economics of Bicycles for the Mind
34034.authors: Ajay K. Agrawal, Joshua S. Gans, Avi Goldfarb
34034.abstract: Steve Jobs described computers as “bicycles for the mind,” a tool that allowed people to dramatically leverage their capabilities. This paper presents a formal model of cognitive tools and technologies that enhance mental capabilities. We consider agents engaged in iterative task improvement, where cognitive tools are assumed to be substitutes for implementation skills and may or may not be complements to judgment, depending on their type. The ability to recognise opportunities to start or improve a process, which we term opportunity judgment, is shown to always complement cognitive tools. The ability to know which action to take in a given state, which we term payoff judgment, is not necessarily a complement to cognitive tools. Using these concepts, we can synthesise the empirical literature on the impact of computers and artificial intelligence (AI) on productivity and inequality. Specifically, while both computers and AI appear to increase productivity, computers have also contributed to increased inequality. Empirical work on the impact of AI on inequality has shown both increases and decreases, depending on the context. We also apply the model to understand how cognitive tools might influence incentives to automate processes and allocate decision-making authority within teams.
34034.zh_abstract: 史蒂夫·乔布斯将计算机描述为“思维的自行车”，一种让人们能够极大发挥自身能力的工具。本文提出了一个增强心智能力的认知工具和技术的形式化模型。我们考虑从事迭代任务改进的代理人，其中认知工具被假定为实施技能的替代品，并且根据其类型，可能或可能不与判断力互补。识别启动或改进过程机会的能力（我们称之为机会判断）被证明总是与认知工具互补。在给定状态下知道采取何种行动的能力（我们称之为收益判断）不一定是认知工具的互补品。利用这些概念，我们可以综合关于计算机和人工智能对生产率和不平等影响的实证文献。具体来说，虽然计算机和人工智能似乎都提高了生产率，但计算机也导致了不平等的加剧。关于人工智能对不平等影响的实证工作显示，根据具体情境，不平等既有增加也有减少。我们还应用该模型来理解认知工具如何可能影响自动化流程的激励以及在团队内分配决策权。

34033.title: Did California's Fast Food Minimum Wage Reduce Employment?
34033.zh_title: 加州快餐业最低工资是否减少了就业？
34033.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Olivia Edwards, Jonathan Meer
34033.abstract: We analyze the effect of California's $\$20$ fast food minimum wage, which was enacted in September 2023 and went into effect in April 2024, on employment in the fast food sector. In unadjusted data from the Quarterly Census of Employment and Wages, we find that employment in California's fast food sector declined by 2.7 percent relative to employment in the fast food sector elsewhere in the United States from September 2023 through September 2024. Adjusting for pre-AB 1228 trends increases this differential decline to 3.2 percent, while netting out the equivalent employment changes in non-minimum-wage-intensive industries further increases the decline. Our median estimate translates into a loss of 18,000 jobs in California's fast food sector relative to the counterfactual.
34033.zh_abstract: 我们分析了加州20美元快餐业最低工资（于2023年9月颁布，2024年4月生效）对快餐业就业的影响。在未经调整的《季度就业与工资普查》数据中，我们发现，从2023年9月到2024年9月，加州快餐业就业相对于美国其他地区快餐业就业下降了2.7%。在调整了AB 1228法案前的趋势后，这一差异下降幅度增至3.2%，而剔除非最低工资密集型行业的等效就业变化后，下降幅度进一步扩大。我们的中位数估计表明，相对于反事实情景，加州快餐业损失了18,000个工作岗位。

34032.title: The Effect of Hospital Breastfeeding Policies on Infant Health
34032.zh_title: 医院母乳喂养政策对婴儿健康的影响
34032.authors: Emily C. Lawler, Meghan M. Skira
34032.abstract: We study the effects of state hospital regulations intended to increase breastfeeding by requiring certain care standards during the postpartum hospital stay. Policy adoption increased breastfeeding initiation by 3.3–4.1 percentage points (4.2–5.2 percent) and breastfeeding at 3 months postpartum by 6–9 percent. Further, following adoption, infant mortality declined by 0.2 deaths per 1,000 live births (3.5 percent), and infant hospitalization charges fell. Declines in mortality and charges primarily occurred among medically vulnerable infants, consistent with evidence that breast milk supports immune development. Additional evidence suggests that improvements in infant sleep practices also played a role in reducing mortality.
34032.zh_abstract: 我们研究了旨在通过要求产后住院期间特定护理标准来提高母乳喂养率的州级医院法规的影响。政策实施使母乳喂养启动率提高了3.3至4.1个百分点（4.2%至5.2%），产后3个月母乳喂养率提高了6%至9%。此外，政策实施后，婴儿死亡率每千活产下降0.2例（3.5%），婴儿住院费用也有所降低。死亡率和费用的下降主要发生在医学上脆弱的婴儿中，这与母乳支持免疫系统发育的证据一致。其他证据表明，婴儿睡眠实践的改善也在降低死亡率方面发挥了作用。

34031.title: Evaluating Experimental Designs
34031.abstract: This introductory chapter outlines key criteria for evaluating experimental measures, and connects these criteria to the selection of experimental parameters across various contexts. We aim for this chapter to serve as a framework for assessing the different measures, elicitations, and designs explored throughout the handbook.
34031.zh_abstract: 这篇引言章节概述了评估实验措施的关键标准，并将这些标准与不同情境下实验参数的选择联系起来。我们旨在使本章成为一个框架，用于评估手册中探讨的各种措施、诱导方法和设计。

34030.title: Does Universal Occupational Licensing Recognition Improve Patient Access? Evidence from Healthcare Utilization
34030.zh_title: 通用职业执照互认能否改善患者就医？来自医疗保健利用的证据
34030.authors: Yun taek Oh, Morris M. Kleiner
34030.abstract: This paper examines the impact of universal reciprocity of out-of-state physician licenses on the regional labor supply of physicians and consumers’ access to healthcare services. After adopting universal reciprocity, out-of-state practice physicians per capita increased by 0.012. Respondents with personal doctors or healthcare providers increased by 6.0 percentage points, and those having medical cost issues decreased by 1.5 percentage points among working-age individuals. Residency requirements for license reciprocity serve as barriers to improving access to healthcare services. Reducing regulatory barriers could achieve regional equilibrium and enhance both consumer and worker welfare in healthcare.
34030.zh_abstract: 本文研究了州外医生执照的通用互认对医生区域劳动力供给和消费者医疗保健服务可及性的影响。在采用通用互认后，人均州外执业医生增加了0.012人。在劳动年龄个体中，拥有个人医生或医疗保健提供者的受访者比例增加了6.0个百分点，而存在医疗费用问题的比例下降了1.5个百分点。执照互认的居住要求是改善医疗保健服务可及性的障碍。减少监管壁垒可以实现区域均衡，并提高医疗保健中消费者和工人的福利。
34030.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：I31, I50, J08, J22, J40, J44, J48, J68

34029.title: The Death and Life of Great British Cities
34029.zh_title: 伟大英国城市的死亡与生命
34029.authors: Stephan Heblich, Dávid Krisztián Nagy, Alex Trew, Yanos Zylberberg
34029.abstract: Does industrial concentration shape the life and death of cities? We identify settlements from historical maps of England and Wales (1790–1820), isolate exogenous variation in their late 19th-century size and industrial concentration, and estimate the causal impact of size and concentration on later dynamics. Industrial concentration has a negative effect on long-run productivity—independent of industry trends and consistent with cross-industry Jacobs externalities. A spatial model quantifies the role of fundamentals, industry trends, and Jacobs externalities in shaping industry-city dynamics and isolates a new, dynamic trade-off in the design of place-based policies.
34029.zh_abstract: 产业集中度是否塑造了城市的生命与死亡？我们从英格兰和威尔士的历史地图（1790-1820年）中识别出定居点，分离出它们19世纪末规模和产业集中度的外生变异，并估计规模和集中度对后续动态的因果影响。产业集中度对长期生产率有负面影响——独立于行业趋势，且与跨行业的雅各布斯外部性一致。一个空间模型量化了基础条件、行业趋势和雅各布斯外部性在塑造行业-城市动态中的作用，并分离出地方政策设计中一个新的动态权衡。

34028.title: Digital Media Mergers: Theory and Application to Facebook-Instagram
34028.zh_title: 数字媒体并购：理论与Facebook-Instagram案例应用
34028.abstract: We present a new model of competition between digital media platforms with targeted advertising. The model provides new insights around how user heterogeneity and overlap, along with user and advertiser substitution patterns, determine equilibrium ad load. We apply the model to evaluate the proposed separation of Facebook and Instagram. We estimate structural parameters using evidence on diminishing returns to advertising from a new randomized experiment and information on user overlap, diversion ratios, and price elasticity from earlier experiments. In counterfactual simulations, a Facebook-Instagram separation increases ad loads, transferring surplus from platforms and users to advertisers, with limited total surplus effects.
34028.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个具有定向广告的数字媒体平台竞争的新模型。该模型围绕用户异质性和重叠性，以及用户和广告商的替代模式如何决定均衡广告负荷，提供了新的见解。我们将该模型应用于评估Facebook与Instagram的拟议拆分。我们利用来自一项新随机实验中广告收益递减的证据，以及来自早期实验中用户重叠、转移比率和价格弹性的信息，估计了结构参数。在反事实模拟中，Facebook-Instagram的拆分增加了广告负荷，将剩余从平台和用户转移到广告商，对总剩余的影响有限。

34027.title: Credit Scores and Inequality across the Life Cycle
34027.zh_title: 生命周期中的信用评分与不平等
34027.authors: Satyajit Chatterjee, Dean Corbae, Kyle P. Dempsey, José-Víctor Ríos-Rull
34027.abstract: Credit scores are a primary screening device for the allocation of credit, housing, and sometimes even employment. In the data, credit scores grow and fan out with age; at the same time, income and consumption inequality also increase with a cohort’s age. We postulate a simple model with hidden information to explore the joint determination of credit scores, income, and consumption over an individual’s lifetime which can replicate these empirical facts. We use the model to understand the role of technologies like big data or legal restrictions limiting information on certain adverse events like medical expenses intended to increase credit market access.
34027.zh_abstract: 信用评分是信贷、住房甚至有时是就业分配的主要筛选工具。数据显示，信用评分随年龄增长而上升并发散；同时，收入不平等和消费不平等也随队列年龄增长而加剧。我们假设一个具有隐藏信息的简单模型，以探索个体一生中信用评分、收入和消费的共同决定，该模型能够复制这些经验事实。我们利用该模型来理解大数据等技术或限制某些不良事件（如医疗费用）信息的法律限制（旨在增加信贷市场准入）的作用。

34026.title: How Do Certificate-of-Need Laws Affect Hospitals? A Review of the Evidence
34026.zh_title: 需求证明法如何影响医院？证据综述
34026.abstract:
Certificate-of-Need (CON) laws require the approval of states’ health planning agencies for health care providers to engage in regulated actions such as opening or expanding facilities or purchasing equipment. Such laws initially aimed to restrain health care costs and wasteful redundancies, but they are also now seen by advocates as helping to preserve the financial viability of struggling hospitals. Opponents of CON laws argue that they stifle competition, leading to inflated costs and limited options for accessing care.

This study reviews the literature on the impacts of CON laws. All else equal, economic theory suggests that hospitals should see fewer new competitors, charge higher prices, and earn higher net revenues as a result of CON laws. Reduced competition can also weaken incentives to operate efficiently and deliver high quality care. However, these predictions assume otherwise perfectly competitive markets, and health care markets are heavily distorted in ways that change meaningfully over time. The need for new entrants to obtain regulatory approval could conceivably improve their quality of care while also helping to ensure that safety-net hospitals do not need to shut down unprofitable departments or close completely. Further, CON laws restrain not only entry of new facilities but also expansion of existing facilities, limiting their ability to leverage potential regulatory advantages.

Viewed in its totality, the available evidence supports some of the predictions of conventional economic theory but not others. In at least some cases, CON laws restrict both entry of new competitors and expansion of existing hospitals. The reduction in competitors increases the number of procedures per hospital. However, there is little evidence that this translates to increased prices or higher hospital profitability, and hardly any research tests for reduced closure rates. Studies on hospital efficiency and quality of care for procedures performed exclusively at hospitals mostly point to null or negative effects, but evidence on quality is more favorable for services that can be provided outside of hospitals.

We conclude that, despite the fact that the literature on CON laws is already large, more research is needed. Future work should utilize the latest tools for identifying causal effects and better account for the wide variation in CON laws across states.
34026.zh_abstract: 需求证明法要求医疗保健提供者在进行受监管的行动（如开设或扩建设施、购买设备）之前，必须获得州卫生规划机构的批准。此类法律最初旨在控制医疗成本和浪费性重复，但现在也被倡导者视为有助于维持陷入困境医院的财务生存能力。反对者则认为需求证明法抑制竞争，导致成本膨胀和就医选择受限。
34026.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：I11, I18, L25, L51

34025.title: Designing Consent: Choice Architecture and Consumer Welfare in Data Sharing
34025.zh_title: 设计同意：数据共享中的选择架构与消费者福利
34025.authors: Chiara Farronato, Andrey Fradkin, Tesary Lin
34025.abstract: We study the welfare consequences of choice architecture for online privacy using a field experiment that randomizes cookie consent banners. We study three ways in which firms or policymakers can influence choices: (1) nudging users through banner design to encourage acceptance of cookie tracking; (2) setting defaults when users dismiss banners; and (3) implementing consent decisions at the website versus browser level. Absent design manipulation, users accept all cookies more than half of the time. Placing cookie options behind extra clicks strongly influences choices, shifting users toward more easily accessible alternatives. Many users dismiss banners without making an explicit choice, underscoring the importance of default settings. Survey evidence further reveals substantial confusion about default settings. Using a structural model, we find that among consent policies requiring site-specific decisions, consumer surplus is maximized when consent interfaces clearly display all options and default to acceptance in the absence of an explicit choice. However, the welfare gains from optimizing banner design are much smaller than those from adopting browser-level consent, which eliminates the time costs of repeated decisions.
34025.zh_abstract: 我们通过一项随机化Cookie同意横幅的实地实验，研究了选择架构对在线隐私的福利影响。我们探讨了企业或政策制定者影响选择的三种方式：（1）通过横幅设计引导用户接受Cookie追踪；（2）在用户关闭横幅时设置默认选项；（3）在网站层面与浏览器层面实施同意决策。在没有设计操纵的情况下，用户超过一半的时间会接受所有Cookie。将Cookie选项置于额外点击之后会强烈影响选择，使用户转向更易访问的替代选项。许多用户在未做出明确选择的情况下关闭横幅，这凸显了默认设置的重要性。调查证据进一步显示，用户对默认设置存在严重困惑。通过结构模型，我们发现，在要求网站特定决策的同意政策中，当同意界面清晰显示所有选项并在无明确选择时默认接受时，消费者剩余最大化。然而，优化横幅设计带来的福利收益远小于采用浏览器层面同意（消除了重复决策的时间成本）所带来的收益。
34025.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：C93, D18, D83, D91, K20, L51, L86

34024.title: Strategic Patenting: Evidence from the Biopharmaceutical Industry
34024.zh_title: 战略性专利化：来自生物制药行业的证据
34024.authors: Michael D. Frakes, Melissa F. Wasserman
34024.abstract: Biological drugs account for just two percent of prescriptions filled in the U.S. but fifty percent of prescription-drug spending. To explore the role patents play in explaining high biologics prices, we build the first comprehensive database of patents associated with all FDA-approved biologics. We first establish that much of what drives biologic patenting is the desire to block entry by competing biosimilars. For these purposes, we estimate the response to a 2010 Act that created an abbreviated pathway for biosimilars to receive FDA approval. We then document robust evidence consistent with two patenting strategies that may block biosimilar competition: thicketing and evergreening, whereby firms supplement primary patents with a dense web of later-expiring patents on secondary drug features. We conduct various exercises to suggest that these behaviors are undertaken with exclusionary purposes that go beyond the traditional justifications of the patent system. We then set forth various descriptive statistics surrounding biosimilar entry to suggest that these patenting strategies are, in fact, effective at delaying biosimilar entry. Finally, we simulate the degree to which biologics patent portfolios are impacted by policy proposals currently under consideration to address thicketing and evergreening.
34024.zh_abstract: 生物药品仅占美国处方药配药量的百分之二，却占处方药支出的百分之五十。为了探究专利在解释生物药高价中的作用，我们构建了首个与所有FDA批准生物药相关的专利综合数据库。我们首先确定，推动生物药专利化的主要动机是阻止竞争性生物类似药的进入。为此，我们估算了2010年法案（该法案创建了生物类似药获得FDA批准的简化路径）的响应。随后，我们记录了与两种可能阻碍生物类似药竞争的专利策略一致的稳健证据：专利丛林化和专利长青化，即企业用一系列到期较晚的次级药物特征专利来补充主要专利。我们进行了各种分析，以表明这些行为具有排他性目的，超出了专利制度的传统正当理由。接着，我们围绕生物类似药的进入提供了各种描述性统计，以表明这些专利策略实际上有效地延迟了生物类似药的进入。最后，我们模拟了当前正在考虑用于应对专利丛林化和长青化的政策提案对生物药专利组合的影响程度。
34024.meta: Programs：EH, IO, LE, PR；JEL：K0, L50, L65, O34

34023.title: Introducing a High-School Exit Exam in Science: Consequences in Massachusetts
34023.zh_title: 引入高中科学毕业考试：马萨诸塞州的后果
34023.authors: Ann Mantil, John Papay, Preeya P. Mbekeani, Richard J. Murnane
34023.abstract: Preparing students for science, technology, and engineering careers is an urgent state policy challenge. We examine the design and roll-out of a science testing requirement for high-school graduation in Massachusetts. While science test performance has improved over time for all demographic subgroups, we observe rising inequality in failure rates and retest success. English learners, almost 8% of all test-takers, account for 53% of students who never pass. We find large differences by family income, even conditional on previous test scores, that raise equity implications. Using a regression-discontinuity design, we show that barely passing the exam increases high-school graduation and college outcomes of students near the score threshold, particularly for females and students from higher-income families.
34023.zh_abstract: 为学生从事科学、技术和工程职业做好准备是一项紧迫的州政策挑战。我们研究了马萨诸塞州高中毕业科学测试要求的设计与推广。尽管所有人口亚组的科学测试成绩随时间推移有所提高，但我们观察到不及格率和重考成功率方面的不平等在加剧。英语学习者占所有考生的近8%，却占从未通过考试学生的53%。我们发现，即使控制了先前的考试成绩，家庭收入也带来了巨大差异，这引发了公平性问题。通过断点回归设计，我们表明，勉强通过考试会提高分数阈值附近学生的高中毕业率和大学成果，尤其是对女性和来自高收入家庭的学生而言。

34022.title: Jackpot for Good: Can Lottery Matches Increase Charitable Giving?
34022.zh_title: 为善而中奖：彩票配捐能否增加慈善捐赠？
34022.authors: Amelia Ahles, Joanna Lahey, Marco A. Palma
34022.abstract: Can lottery matching gifts accruing to the charity (instead of raffles benefiting the donors) increase charitable donations? We recruit 1,402 online participants to donate to hunger-related charities from a 10-token endowment under different matching conditions. We confirm earlier results that a 1:1 match increases giving over no match, and a 2:1 match does not. But, a lottery match to the charity with a 1% chance of 100 tokens works equally well as a 1:1 match, and, importantly, a 0.5% chance of 100 tokens match also works equally well, allowing for matching funds to go twice as far.
34022.zh_abstract: 累积给慈善机构的彩票配捐（而非惠及捐赠者的抽奖）能否增加慈善捐赠？我们招募了1402名在线参与者，让他们从10个代币的初始禀赋中，在不同配捐条件下向与饥饿相关的慈善机构捐款。我们证实了早期结果：1:1配捐比无配捐更能增加捐赠，而2:1配捐则不然。但是，以1%概率获得100个代币的慈善机构彩票配捐效果与1:1配捐相当，重要的是，以0.5%概率获得100个代币的配捐效果也同样好，这使得配捐资金的使用效率提高了一倍。
34022.meta: Programs：CF, PE；JEL：C90, D64, H41, L3, L30, L31

34021.title: Sovereign Default and the Decline in Interest Rates
34021.authors: Max Miller, James D. Paron, Jessica Wachter
34021.abstract: Sovereign debt yields have declined dramatically over the last half-century. Standard explanations, including aging populations and increases in asset demand from abroad, encounter difficulties when confronted with the full range of evidence. We propose an explanation based on a decline in inflation and default risk. We show that a model with sovereign default captures the decline in interest rates, the stability of equity valuation ratios, and the reduction in investment and output growth. Calibrations of the model post-Covid suggest that sovereign default risk may have returned.
34021.zh_abstract: 过去半个世纪，主权债务收益率大幅下降。包括人口老龄化和来自国外的资产需求增加在内的标准解释，在面对全部证据时遇到了困难。我们提出了一种基于通胀风险和违约风险下降的解释。我们表明，一个包含主权违约的模型能够捕捉利率的下降、股权估值比率的稳定性以及投资和产出增长的放缓。模型在新冠疫情后的校准表明，主权违约风险可能已经回归。

34020.title: Geoeconomic Pressure
34020.authors: Christopher Clayton, Antonio Coppola, Matteo Maggiori, Jesse Schreger
34020.abstract: Geoeconomic pressure—the use of existing economic relationships by governments to achieve geopolitical or economic goals—is a prominent feature of global power dynamics. This paper introduces a methodology using large language models (LLMs) to systematically identify the application of and response to geoeconomic pressure from large textual corpora. We classify which governments apply pressure to which foreign targets, using which instruments, firms, and products. We demonstrate that firms affected by tariffs respond primarily with price changes whereas firms affected by export controls respond disproportionately by investing in research and development. We document significant heterogeneity in how firms respond to pressure based on whether their home government is applying the pressure, whether their home country is the recipient of the pressure, or whether they are based in an affected third party country. Finally, we quantify the degree of measurement uncertainty generated by the LLM-based analysis by comparing the classifications across multiple open-weight models as well as considering a wide range of variations of our prompts.
34020.zh_abstract: 地缘经济压力——政府利用现有经济关系来实现地缘政治或经济目标——是全球权力动态的一个显著特征。本文介绍了一种使用大型语言模型（LLM）的方法，从大型文本语料库中系统地识别地缘经济压力的施加与应对。我们分类了哪些政府对哪些外国目标施加压力，以及使用了哪些工具、企业和产品。我们证明，受关税影响的企业主要通过价格变化来应对，而受出口管制影响的企业则不成比例地通过投资研发来应对。我们记录了企业应对压力的显著异质性，这取决于其本国政府是否在施加压力、其本国是否是压力的接收国，或者它们是否位于受影响的第三国。最后，我们通过比较多个开源模型的分类结果，并考虑提示词的广泛变化，量化了基于LLM分析所产生的测量不确定性程度。
34020.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ITI, ME, POL；JEL：C4, F3, F4, G3

34019.title: Firm Heterogeneity and Adverse Selection in External Finance: Micro Evidence and Macro Implications
34019.zh_title: 企业异质性与外部融资中的逆向选择：微观证据与宏观含义
34019.authors: Xing Guo, Pablo Ottonello, Thomas Winberry, Toni Whited
34019.abstract: We study the macroeconomic consequences of asymmetric information between firms and external investors. To do so, we develop a heterogeneous firm macro model in which firms have private information about their quality. Private information creates a lemons problem in the market for external finance, depressing investment relative to the full information benchmark. We measure the distribution of private information, and therefore the magnitude of this lemons problem, using high-frequency stock price changes when firms raise new funding (revealing their quality to the market). We find that changes in distribution of private information are a quantitatively important determinant of aggregate fluctuations. For example, a spike in private information accounts for 40% of the decline in aggregate investment during the 2007-2009 financial crisis and made monetary stimulus significantly less effective at that time.
34019.zh_abstract: 我们研究了企业与外部投资者之间信息不对称的宏观经济后果。为此，我们构建了一个异质性企业宏观模型，其中企业对其质量拥有私人信息。私人信息在外部融资市场中造成了柠檬问题，相对于完全信息基准，抑制了投资。我们利用企业在筹集新资金时（向市场揭示其质量）的高频股价变动来衡量私人信息的分布，从而衡量柠檬问题的严重程度。我们发现，私人信息分布的变化是总量波动的一个数量上重要的决定因素。例如，在2007-2009年金融危机期间，私人信息的激增解释了总投资下降的40%，并使得当时的货币刺激政策效果显著降低。
34019.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME, PR；JEL：E22, E32, E52, G30

34018.title: Revisiting the Interest Rate Effects of Federal Debt
34018.zh_title: 重新审视联邦债务的利率效应
34018.authors: Michael Plante, Alexander W. Richter, Sarah Zubairy
34018.abstract: This paper revisits the relationship between federal debt and interest rates, which is a key input for assessments of fiscal sustainability. Estimating this relationship is challenging due to confounding effects from business cycle dynamics and changes in monetary policy. A common approach is to regress long-term forward interest rates on long-term projections of federal debt. We show that issues regarding nonstationarity have become far more pronounced over the last 20 years, significantly biasing the recent estimates based on this methodology. Estimating the model in first differences addresses these concerns. We find that a 1 percentage point increase in the debt-to-GDP ratio raises the 5-year-ahead, 5-year Treasury rate by about 3 basis points, which is statistically and economically significant and highly robust. Roughly three-quarters of the increase in interest rates reflects term premia rather than expected short-term real rates.
34018.zh_abstract: 本文重新审视了联邦债务与利率之间的关系，这是评估财政可持续性的关键输入。由于商业周期动态和货币政策变化的混淆效应，估计这种关系具有挑战性。一种常见的方法是将长期远期利率对联邦债务的长期预测进行回归。我们表明，非平稳性问题在过去20年中变得更为突出，显著扭曲了基于该方法的最新估计。对模型进行一阶差分估计可以解决这些问题。我们发现，债务与GDP比率每增加1个百分点，会使5年远期5年期国债利率上升约3个基点，这在统计和经济上均显著且高度稳健。利率上升中大约四分之三反映的是期限溢价，而非预期的短期实际利率。

34016.title: Wealth Inequality, Labor Market Arrangements and the Secular Decline in the Real Interest Rate
34016.zh_title: 财富不平等、劳动力市场安排与实际利率的长期下降
34016.authors: John B. Donaldson, Hyung Seok E. Kim, Rajnish Mehra
34016.abstract: We develop a dynamic macroeconomic model in which the secular decline in real interest rates arises endogenously from rising wealth inequality. Challenging the standard “safe asset shortage” hypothesis, the model shows how falling real rates can coexist with a stable safe asset ratio—closely matching U.S. empirical patterns. The mechanism combines limited financial market participation, which concentrates capital ownership among a shrinking class of stockholders, with egalitarian wage bargaining, which generates time-varying labor income shares under incomplete markets. As inequality increases, stockholders face higher financial and operating leverage, increasing their consumption volatility and precautionary demand for bonds. At the same time, greater wage instability raises workers’ demand for safe assets. The resulting surge in precautionary savings from both groups depresses real returns and creates the appearance of a safe asset shortage, despite an unchanged supply. This outcome reflects a pecuniary externality: agents fail to internalize the aggregate constraint on safe assets, especially over the business cycle. Our calibrated model reproduces key macro-financial patterns and offers new insights into the joint dynamics of wealth distribution, labor market arrangements, and asset pricing.
34016.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个动态宏观经济模型，其中实际利率的长期下降是由财富不平等加剧内生引起的。该模型挑战了标准的“安全资产短缺”假说，展示了实际利率下降如何与稳定的安全资产比率共存——这与美国的经验模式高度吻合。其机制结合了有限金融市场参与（这导致资本所有权集中于不断缩小的股东阶层）与平等主义工资谈判（在不完全市场下产生时变的劳动收入份额）。随着不平等加剧，股东面临更高的财务和经营杠杆，从而增加了其消费波动性和预防性债券需求。同时，工资不稳定性加剧提高了工人对安全资产的需求。由此产生的来自两个群体的预防性储蓄激增压低了实际回报，并造成了安全资产短缺的表象，尽管供给并未改变。这一结果反映了一种货币外部性：代理人未能内化安全资产的总体约束，尤其是在经济周期中。我们的校准模型再现了关键的宏观金融模式，并为财富分配、劳动力市场安排和资产定价的联合动态提供了新见解。
34016.meta: Programs：AP, EFG；JEL：D31, D52, E13, E21, E24, E32, E43, E44, G1, G12, J41, J63, J64

34014.title: Optimal Estimation of Two-Way Effects under Limited Mobility
34014.zh_title: 有限流动性下双向效应的最优估计
34014.authors: Xu Cheng, Sheng Chao Ho, Frank Schorfheide
34014.abstract: We propose an empirical Bayes estimator for two-way effects in linked data sets based on a novel prior that leverages patterns of assortative matching observed in the data. To capture limited mobility we model the bipartite graph associated with the matched data in an asymptotic framework where its Laplacian matrix has small eigenvalues that converge to zero. The prior hyperparameters that control the shrinkage are determined by minimizing an unbiased risk estimate. We show the proposed empirical Bayes estimator is asymptotically optimal in compound loss, despite the weak connectivity of the bipartite graph and the potential misspecification of the prior. We estimate teacher values-added from a linked North Carolina Education Research Data Center student-teacher data set.
34014.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种基于新颖先验的、用于关联数据集中双向效应的经验贝叶斯估计量，该先验利用了数据中观察到的分类匹配模式。为了捕捉有限流动性，我们在一个渐近框架下对与匹配数据相关联的二部图进行建模，其中该图的拉普拉斯矩阵具有收敛于零的小特征值。控制收缩的先验超参数通过最小化无偏风险估计来确定。我们证明了所提出的经验贝叶斯估计量在复合损失下是渐近最优的，尽管二部图连通性较弱且先验可能被错误设定。我们利用北卡罗来纳州教育研究数据中心的学生-教师关联数据集来估计教师的增值效应。

34013.title: Racial Inequality in France
34013.authors: Yajna Govind, Paolo Santini, Ellora Derenoncourt
34013.abstract: We study racial inequality in 21st century France. Using parents’ nationality at birth, we overcome the lack of ethno-racial statistics stemming from the country’s “color-blind” approach. We document substantial earnings penalties for racial minorities along the income distribution. Penalties are larger at the median than the top and for Middle-Eastern and North African (MENA) and Sub-Saharan African origin (Black) individuals. We compare racial inequality in France vs. the U.S. by simulating where French minorities would fall in the U.S. distribution. Black and Non-White individuals in France benefit from the country’s lower overall inequality, but experience comparable, occasionally larger, rank gaps.
34013.zh_abstract: 我们研究了21世纪法国的种族不平等。利用父母出生时的国籍，我们克服了因该国“色盲”方法而导致的种族统计数据的缺乏。我们记录了种族少数群体在收入分配中面临的显著收入惩罚。惩罚在中位数处大于顶端，且对中东和北非（MENA）以及撒哈拉以南非洲裔（黑人）个体更为严重。我们通过模拟法国少数群体在美国收入分配中的位置，比较了法国与美国的种族不平等。法国的黑人和非白人个体受益于该国较低的整体不平等水平，但经历了可比、有时甚至更大的排名差距。

34012.title: Do Workforce Development Programs Bridge the Skills Gap?
34012.zh_title: 劳动力发展项目能否弥合技能差距？
34012.authors: Eleanor W. Dillon, Lisa B. Kahn, Joanna Venator, Michael Dalton
34012.abstract: Most U.S. states have workforce development programs that offer firms grants to train their own workers. We create unique data linkages between participating firms, employment, and vacancies to explore the determinants and consequences of such programs. Training grants are more prevalent in markets where firms face greater employee poaching risk, suggesting these programs help overcome a market failure in updating worker skills. After training, firms experience prolonged employment growth and downskilling in their job posts, relative to a matched control group. Training appears to help firms move toward optimal scale and expand opportunities for less skilled workers.
34012.zh_abstract: 美国大多数州都有劳动力发展项目，向企业提供资助以培训其自身员工。我们创建了参与企业、就业和职位空缺之间的独特数据关联，以探究此类项目的决定因素和后果。培训资助在员工被挖角风险更高的市场中更为普遍，这表明这些项目有助于克服更新工人技能方面的市场失灵。与匹配的对照组相比，培训后，企业经历了持续的就业增长，并且其招聘岗位的技能要求有所降低。培训似乎有助于企业向最优规模迈进，并扩大技能较低工人的机会。
34012.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE, PR；JEL：J24, J42, J68, M53

34011.title: Public Goods Under Financial Distress
34011.abstract: I examine the effects of public debt on municipal services and real outcomes during financial crises using a unique archival dataset of U.S. cities from 1924 to 1943. Unlike today’s countercyclical fiscal policies, the Great Depression provides a rare setting to observe fiscal shocks without substantial intergovernmental or Federal Reserve support. My findings show that financial market frictions – especially the need to refinance debt – led cities to sharply cut expenditures, particularly on capital projects and police services. As urban development halted during the Depression, cities with high pre-crisis debt levels faced significant austerity pressures, a decline in population growth, a rise in crime, and a departure of skilled public servants from municipal governments.
34011.zh_abstract: 我利用1924年至1943年美国城市的独特档案数据集，考察了金融危机期间公共债务对市政服务和实际结果的影响。与当今逆周期的财政政策不同，大萧条提供了一个在没有大量政府间或美联储支持的情况下观察财政冲击的罕见背景。我的研究结果表明，金融市场摩擦——尤其是债务再融资的需求——导致城市大幅削减支出，特别是资本项目和警察服务。随着大萧条期间城市发展停滞，危机前债务水平高的城市面临显著的紧缩压力，表现为人口增长下降、犯罪率上升以及熟练公职人员从市政政府离职。

34010.title: The Geography of Innovative Firms
34010.authors: Craig A. Chikis, Benny Kleinman, Marta Prato
34010.abstract: Firms conducting R&D across multiple local markets account for most U.S. innovation. We study how their geographic scope affects growth and whether it is socially optimal. We develop a spatial growth model with multi-market firms that generate local knowledge spillovers. In equilibrium, firms may expand into too few or too many markets, depending on the sensitivity of spillovers to their local footprint. We estimate the model using data on R&D locations, patents, and citations, and find that firms under-invest in geographic expansion. Through model counterfactuals, we show that welfare gains from policies promoting broader geographic expansion are higher than traditional R&D subsidies.
34010.zh_abstract: 在多个地方市场进行研发的企业占据了美国大部分创新。我们研究其地理范围如何影响增长以及是否达到社会最优。我们构建了一个包含多市场企业的空间增长模型，这些企业产生本地知识溢出。在均衡状态下，企业可能扩张到过少或过多的市场，这取决于溢出对其本地足迹的敏感性。我们利用研发地点、专利和引用的数据估计该模型，发现企业对地理扩张的投资不足。通过模型反事实分析，我们表明，促进更广泛地理扩张的政策所带来的福利收益高于传统的研发补贴。
34010.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, PR；JEL：E0, F0, L0, O0, R0

34009.title: Unpriced Risks: Rethinking Cross-Sectional Asset Pricing
34009.zh_title: 未定价风险：重新思考横截面资产定价
34009.authors: Mikhail Chernov, Magnus Dahlquist, Lars A. Lochstoer
34009.abstract: Characteristic-based factors embed large unpriced components that depress Sharpe ratios and deviate from the mean-variance efficient (MVE) frontier. We discuss how to decompose tradable factor returns into priced (MVE) and unpriced components, showing that hedging unpriced variation realigns factors with efficiency. We outline theoretical conditions for characteristic portfolios to span the MVE and describe practical hedge-portfolio construction. In some asset classes—currencies and sovereign bonds—real-time estimation of the MVE is feasible. In the case of equities, one can hedge unpriced risks from characteristic-based factors. Empirically, unpriced risks account for 30–99% of factor return variance, and hedging can more than double Sharpe ratios.
34009.zh_abstract: 基于特征的因子包含了大量未定价的成分，这些成分压低了夏普比率，并偏离了均值-方差有效（MVE）前沿。我们讨论了如何将可交易因子收益分解为定价（MVE）和未定价成分，表明对冲未定价的波动可以使因子重新与效率对齐。我们概述了特征投资组合能够张成MVE的理论条件，并描述了实际对冲投资组合的构建。在某些资产类别中——货币和主权债券——MVE的实时估计是可行的。在股票的情况下，可以对冲来自基于特征因子的未定价风险。实证表明，未定价风险占因子收益方差的30-99%，对冲可以使夏普比率提高一倍以上。

34008.title: Debt and Assets
34008.authors: Efraim Benmelech, Nitish Kumar, Raghuram Rajan
34008.abstract: We examine the importance of corporate assets in supporting debt. Prior studies typically see only secured debt as asset backed, while the rest is deemed cash flow based. This implies only a small fraction of US debt is asset backed. Yet because corporations often resist offering security explicitly to debt, much unsecured debt is implicitly asset backed. Moreover, we find that the degree to which unsecured debt is asset backed can change with a firm’s condition and the economic situation. Consequently, asset values can affect the quantum and price of borrowing, with effects accentuated in adverse economic conditions, as suggested by financial accelerator theories. Given that a corporation’s debt is typically supported by both expected cash flows and assets, with the relative support varying with time and situation, the industry practice of classifying debt as “asset based” or “cash flow based” is overly categorical, especially for long term corporate bonds.
34008.zh_abstract: 我们考察了公司资产在支持债务方面的重要性。以往的研究通常只将有担保债务视为资产支持型，而其余债务则被视为基于现金流。这意味着美国只有一小部分债务是资产支持型的。然而，由于公司通常不愿明确为债务提供担保，许多无担保债务实际上是隐含的资产支持型。此外，我们发现无担保债务受资产支持的程度会随着公司状况和经济形势而变化。因此，资产价值会影响借款的数量和价格，其影响在经济不利条件下会加剧，正如金融加速器理论所表明的那样。鉴于公司的债务通常同时由预期现金流和资产支持，且相对支持程度随时间和情况而变化，行业中将债务分类为“资产基础型”或“现金流基础型”的做法过于绝对，尤其是对于长期公司债券而言。
34008.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E50, G3, G33

34007.title: Income Elasticity of Demand for Healthy and Unhealthy Foods: Evidence from Lump-Sum Earned Income Tax Credit Payments
34007.zh_title: 健康与非健康食品需求的收入弹性：来自劳动所得税抵免一次性支付的证据
34007.authors: Emma LaGuardia, Leslie McGranahan, Diane Whitmore Schanzenbach
34007.abstract: The Earned Income Tax Credit is unique among social programs in that benefits are not paid out evenly across the calendar year but are received in a lump-sum cash payment. We exploit this feature of the EITC to investigate how receiving this influx of cash affects food expenditure patterns of eligible households. We find consistent evidence that households increase their spending on healthy foods such as fresh fruit and vegetables, meat and poultry, and dairy products when they receive their tax credit. Causal estimates of the spending response to this lump-sum payment are about twice as large as the cross-section variation in spending by income implies. By contrast, there is no measurable increase in spending on soft drinks including sodas and sports drinks, and evidence suggests that spending on soft drinks is relatively inelastic with regard to income.
34007.zh_abstract: 劳动所得税抵免在社会项目中的独特之处在于，其福利并非在整个日历年内均匀发放，而是以一次性现金支付的形式获得。我们利用EITC的这一特点，研究这笔现金流入如何影响符合条件的家庭在食品支出上的模式。我们发现一致的证据表明，当家庭收到税收抵免时，他们会增加在健康食品上的支出，例如新鲜水果和蔬菜、肉类、家禽以及乳制品。对这种一次性支付所引发的支出反应的因果估计值，大约是收入变化所隐含的横截面支出变异的两倍。相比之下，在软饮料（包括汽水和运动饮料）上的支出没有可测量的增长，并且有证据表明，软饮料支出相对于收入而言相对缺乏弹性。

34006.title: International Power
34006.abstract: An interconnected world increases economic efficiency while giving certain countries leverage over others. We aim to describe and understand international power stemming from trade. Using an illustrative model of trade with possibilities of bilateral disputes and ex-post hold-ups, we highlight that bilateral asymmetry in import dependence can be a source of coercive power towards one another. We construct the model-implied measure of international power—asymmetric bilateral import dependence, weighted inversely by sectoral trade elasticities — across country pairs over the past 20 years. Combining this measure with comprehensive data on bilateral engagement events and a high-frequency measure of bilateral geopolitical relationships, we examine the consequences and strategic causes of international power. We show two main empirical results. First, increases in international power between countries — which raise the credibility of threats of trade disruptions — induce more bilateral engagement and negotiations. Second, worsened geopolitical relationships — in anticipation of future disputes — prompt countries to build up greater international power through adjusting trade activities.
34006.zh_abstract: 一个相互关联的世界在提高经济效率的同时，也赋予某些国家对他国的杠杆作用。我们旨在描述和理解源于贸易的国际权力。通过一个说明性的贸易模型，其中包含双边争端和事后敲竹杠的可能性，我们强调双边在进口依赖上的不对称性可以成为相互施加胁迫权力的来源。我们构建了模型所隐含的国际权力衡量指标——即双边进口依赖的不对称性，并按部门贸易弹性进行逆加权——覆盖过去20年间的国家配对。结合这一指标与关于双边接触事件的全面数据以及双边地缘政治关系的高频衡量指标，我们考察了国际权力的后果和战略成因。我们展示了两个主要的实证结果。首先，国家之间国际权力的增加——这提高了贸易中断威胁的可信度——会引发更多的双边接触和谈判。其次，地缘政治关系的恶化——出于对未来争端的预期——会促使各国通过调整贸易活动来积累更大的国际权力。

34005.title: From Rural Schools to City Factories: Assessing the Quality of Chinese Rural Schools
34005.zh_title: 从乡村学校到城市工厂：评估中国乡村学校的质量
34005.authors: Eric A. Hanushek, Le Kang, Xueying Li, Lei Zhang
34005.abstract: The changing pattern of quality in China’s rural schools across time and province is extracted from the differential labor market earnings of rural migrant workers. Variations in rates of return to years of schooling across migrant workers working in the same urban labor market but having different sites of basic education provide for direct estimation of provincial school quality. Corroborating this approach, these school quality estimates prove to be highly correlated with provincial cognitive skill test scores for the same demographic group. Returns to quality increase with economic development level of destination cities. Importantly, quality appears higher and provincial variation appears lower for younger cohorts, indicating at least partial effectiveness of more recent policies aimed at improving rural school quality across provinces. Surprisingly, however, provincial variations in quality are uncorrelated with teacher-student ratio or per student spending.
34005.zh_abstract: 中国乡村学校质量随时间及省份变化的模式，是从农村流动劳动力的差异化劳动力市场收入中提取出来的。在同一城市劳动力市场工作但基础教育地点不同的流动劳动力，其受教育年限回报率的差异，为直接估算省级学校质量提供了依据。与这种方法相印证的是，这些学校质量估计值被证明与同一人口群体的省级认知技能测试分数高度相关。质量的回报随着目的地城市的经济发展水平而增加。重要的是，对于较年轻的群体，质量似乎更高且省级差异更小，这表明近期旨在跨省提高乡村学校质量的政策至少部分有效。然而，令人惊讶的是，省级质量差异与师生比或生均支出并不相关。
34005.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, LS；JEL：H40, I26, J69, O15, R11

34004.title: Political Foundations of Racial Violence in the Post-Reconstruction South
34004.zh_title: 重建后美国南方种族暴力的政治基础
34004.authors: Patrick A. Testa, Jhacova A. Williams
34004.abstract: Election results act as powerful signals, shaping social behavior in ways that can be dramatic and even violent. This paper shows how racial violence in the post-Reconstruction U.S. South was tied to the local performance of the anti-Black Democratic Party in presidential elections. Using a regression discontinuity design based on close presidential vote shares, we find that Southern counties where Democrats lost the popular vote between 1880 and 1900 were nearly twice as likely to experience Black lynchings in the following four years. Despite no corresponding changes in local officeholding, these defeats were salient among local elites. We show that Southern newspapers, closely aligned with the Democratic Party, amplified narratives of Black criminality in the aftermath of Democratic losses. Such accusations were, in turn, frequently invoked by lynch mobs. These findings point to the strategic use of racial violence by Democratic elites, foreshadowing the institutionalized vote suppression of Jim Crow.
34004.zh_abstract: 选举结果作为强有力的信号，能够以戏剧性甚至暴力的方式塑造社会行为。本文展示了重建后美国南方的种族暴力如何与反黑人的民主党在总统选举中的地方表现相关联。利用基于总统选举接近票数份额的断点回归设计，我们发现，在1880年至1900年间民主党输掉普选的南方县，在随后的四年中经历黑人私刑的可能性几乎是其他县的两倍。尽管地方官员任职没有相应变化，但这些失败在当地精英中非常突出。我们表明，与民主党紧密结盟的南方报纸，在民主党失利后放大了关于黑人犯罪行为的叙事。而这类指控又经常被私刑暴徒所引用。这些发现指向民主党精英对种族暴力的策略性使用，这预示着吉姆·克劳制度下制度化的选票压制。
34004.meta: Programs：DAE；JEL：D72, D83, I31, J15, N31, O10

34003.title: Tariffs and Trade Deficits
34003.authors: Lorenzo Caliendo, Samuel S. Kortum, Fernando Parro
34003.abstract: We develop a dynamic multi-country Ricardian trade model with aggregate uncertainty, where trade imbalances emerge as countries exchange goods and assets. We introduce a method for computing counterfactuals in this setting, which doesn’t require specifying the stochastic process of shocks or solving for asset prices. Applying the model to tariff shocks, we quantify their effects on prices, income, spending, and trade imbalances. We find that higher U.S. tariffs reduce the U.S. trade deficit through general equilibrium adjustments, but raise domestic prices and lower real consumption. Our findings highlight that movements in trade imbalances are shaped by the structure of global trade and finance, and that attempts to influence external balances through changes in trade barriers carry significant implications for real economic outcomes.
34003.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个具有总体不确定性的动态多国李嘉图贸易模型，其中贸易失衡源于国家间商品和资产的交换。我们引入了一种在此设定下计算反事实的方法，该方法无需指定冲击的随机过程或求解资产价格。将该模型应用于关税冲击，我们量化了关税对价格、收入、支出和贸易失衡的影响。我们发现，美国提高关税会通过一般均衡调整减少美国的贸易逆差，但同时会提高国内价格并降低实际消费。我们的研究结果强调，贸易失衡的变动是由全球贸易和金融结构所塑造的，并且试图通过改变贸易壁垒来影响外部平衡，会对实际经济结果产生重大影响。

34002.title: Central Banks as Educators
34002.zh_title: 作为教育者的中央银行
34002.abstract: In recent years, central bankers’ speeches and other forms of communication have become pedagogical in nature, aiming to shape public knowledge, beliefs, expectations, and attitudes. With the shift toward expectations management as a monetary policy tool, central banks’ educational role has become a central component of their monetary policymaking, and central bank communication with the public has become a rapidly-growing area of research. I argue that this research is closely related, both thematically and methodologically, to the field of educational psychology. I discuss insights from educational psychology research that could guide central bank communication research—including insights about the challenges and pitfalls that both fields share.
34002.zh_abstract: 近年来，央行行长的演讲及其他形式的沟通本质上已变得具有教学性，旨在塑造公众的知识、信念、预期和态度。随着预期管理成为货币政策工具，央行的教育角色已成为其货币政策制定的核心组成部分，而央行与公众的沟通也成为一个快速发展的研究领域。我认为，这一研究在主题和方法论上都与教育心理学领域密切相关。我讨论了教育心理学研究中可能指导央行沟通研究的见解——包括关于两个领域共同面临的挑战和陷阱的见解。
34002.meta: Programs：ME；JEL：D83, D84, E03, E30, E5, E58

34001.title: When Do Migrants Shape Culture?
34001.abstract: This chapter explores the impacts of migrants on the culture of their destinations. Migrants often assimilate to local social norms and practices, but they also tend to maintain their own culture. Sometimes, beyond preserving their culture, they influence their new neighbors. We propose a conceptual framework to understand when migrants shape culture at their destination—and how. We identify two key conditions for influence (ideological intensity and power structure) and three channels of influence (cultural spillovers, organizational mobilization, and political leverage). We combine insights from political economy, social psychology, and evolutionary approaches to illuminate pathways of influence in historical perspective. Our review offers a new perspective on the mechanisms of cultural transmission, using illustrative cases to characterize the various ways in which migrants shape culture in their destinations.
34001.zh_abstract: 本章探讨了移民对其目的地文化的影响。移民通常会融入当地的社会规范和实践，但他们也倾向于保持自己的文化。有时，除了保存自身文化，他们还会影响新邻居。我们提出了一个概念框架，用以理解移民何时以及如何塑造其目的地的文化。我们识别出两个关键的影响条件（意识形态强度和权力结构）和三个影响渠道（文化溢出、组织动员和政治杠杆）。我们结合政治经济学、社会心理学和进化方法的见解，从历史视角阐明影响的路径。我们的综述为文化传播机制提供了新的视角，通过说明性案例来刻画移民在其目的地塑造文化的各种方式。
34001.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, LS, POL；JEL：D02, F22, J15, N30, P00, Z10, Z13

34000.title: Productivity Beliefs and Efficiency in Science
34000.zh_title: 科学中的生产力信念与效率
34000.authors: Fabio Bertolotti, Kyle R. Myers, Wei Yang Tham
34000.abstract: We develop a method to estimate producers’ productivity beliefs in settings where output quantities and input prices are unobservable, and we use it to evaluate allocative efficiency in the market for science. Our model of researchers’ labor supply shows that their willingness to pay for their two key inputs, funding and time, reveals their underlying productivity beliefs. We estimate the model’s parameters using data from a nationally representative survey of research-active professors from all major fields of science. We find that the distribution of research productivity is highly skewed. Using these estimates, we assess the market’s allocative efficiency by comparing actual input allocations to optimal allocations given various objectives. Overall, the market for science is moderately efficient at maximizing output and researchers’ utility: actual input levels are positively correlated with the optimal levels implied by the model. However, the wedge between researchers’ actual and optimal input levels is often significant and difficult to predict. Our estimates imply that total budgets would need to increase by roughly 40% under actual allocations in order to achieve the same growth in scientific output that we predict under alternative allocations of the current budget. Scaling to the population level, this equates to billions of dollars in funding — there are substantial gains from developing new ways of identifying and supporting talented scientists.
34000.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种方法，用于在产出数量和投入价格不可观测的设定下估计生产者的生产力信念，并利用它来评估科学市场的配置效率。我们的研究人员劳动力供给模型表明，他们对其两个关键投入——资金和时间——的支付意愿，揭示了其潜在的生产力信念。我们利用一项全国代表性调查的数据来估计模型参数，该调查涵盖了所有主要科学领域的活跃研究型教授。我们发现，研究生产力的分布高度偏斜。利用这些估计值，我们通过比较实际投入配置与基于不同目标的最优配置，来评估市场的配置效率。总体而言，科学市场在最大化产出和研究人员效用方面是适度有效的：实际投入水平与模型隐含的最优水平呈正相关。然而，研究人员的实际投入水平与最优投入水平之间的差距通常很大且难以预测。我们的估计表明，在实际配置下，总预算需要增加大约40%，才能实现我们在当前预算的替代配置下所预测的同等科学产出增长。按总体水平推算，这相当于数十亿美元的资金——开发识别和支持有才华科学家的新方法将带来巨大收益。
34000.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：D24, M5, O3, O30, O31, O32, O38, O40

34062.title: Greener on the Other Side: Inequity and Tax Compliance
34062.zh_title: 邻家更绿：不公平与税收合规
34062.authors: Michael C. Best, Luigi Caloi, François Gerard, Evan Plous Kresch, Joana Naritomi, Laura Zoratto
34062.abstract: Governments frequently use proxies for deservingness—tags—to implement progressive tax and transfer policies. These proxies are often imperfect, leading to misclassification and inequities among equally deserving individuals. This paper studies the efficiency effects of such misclassification in the context of the property tax system in Manaus, Brazil. We leverage quasi-experimental variation in inequity generated by the boundaries of geographic sectors used to compute tax liabilities and a large tax reform in a series of augmented boundary discontinuity designs. We find that inequities significantly reduce tax compliance. The elasticity of compliance with respect to inequity is between 0.12 and 0.25, accounting for half of the overall change in compliance at the boundaries. A simple model of presumptive property taxation shows how mistagging affects the optimal tax schedule, highlighting the opposite implications of responses to the level of taxation and to inequity for optimal tax progressivity. Interpreting our findings through the lens of the model implies that optimal progressivity is around 50% lower than it would be absent inequity responses. These results underscore the importance of inequity for public policy design, especially in contexts with low fiscal capacity.
34062.zh_abstract: 政府经常使用应得性代理指标——标签——来实施累进税收和转移支付政策。这些代理指标往往不完美，导致错误分类和同等应得个体之间的不公平。本文在巴西马瑙斯的财产税体系背景下研究了这种错误分类的效率影响。我们利用用于计算税负的地理区域边界所产生的不公平准实验性变化，以及一系列增强的边界断点设计中的一次大规模税制改革。我们发现，不公平显著降低了税收合规性。合规性对不公平的弹性在0.12到0.25之间，占边界处合规性总体变化的一半。一个简单的推定财产税模型展示了错误标签如何影响最优税率表，突出了对税收水平的反应和对不公平的反应对最优累进性的相反含义。通过模型视角解读我们的发现意味着，最优累进性比没有不公平反应时低约50%。这些结果强调了不公平对公共政策设计的重要性，尤其是在财政能力较低的环境中。

34061.title: Capital Budgeting For EPS Maximizers
34061.abstract: To increase a company’s earnings, a project must generate enough income next year to pay for its own financing. Hence, a manager who wants to maximize her EPS (earnings per share) should only invest in accretive projects that have income yields above the firm’s cheapest financing option. This is the max EPS analog to the positive-NPV (net present value) rule. Maximizing EPS ≠ minimizing investment. EPS maximizers use real investment to arbitrage between asset and capital markets. This framework rationalizes the pervasive use of IRRs (internal rates of return) and payback periods. An IRR effectively measures how accretive a project will be. A payback period expresses the project’s income yield as a multiple. Empirically, a simple max EPS model explains M&A payment method and investment-cash flow sensitivity. It also predicts which firms have higher proportions of convertible debt and capitalized interest expense.
34061.zh_abstract: 为了增加公司盈利，一个项目必须产生足够的明年收入来支付其自身的融资成本。因此，希望最大化其每股收益（EPS）的经理人只应投资于那些收入收益率高于公司最便宜融资选择的增值项目。这是最大EPS规则，类似于正净现值（NPV）规则。最大化EPS ≠ 最小化投资。EPS最大化者利用实际投资在资产市场和资本市场之间进行套利。这一框架解释了内部收益率（IRR）和回收期的普遍使用。IRR有效衡量了一个项目的增值程度。回收期将项目的收入收益率表示为倍数。在实证上，一个简单的最大EPS模型解释了并购支付方式和投资-现金流敏感性。它还预测了哪些公司拥有更高比例的可转换债务和资本化利息费用。
34061.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：D03, D21, D22, D92, G02, G31, G32, G34, G35, J33, L21, M41

34060.title: Looking Backward: Long-Term Religious Service Attendance in 66 Countries
34060.zh_title: 回顾过去：66个国家的长期宗教服务出席率
34060.authors: Robert J. Barro, Edgard Dewitte, Laurence Iannaccone
34060.abstract: The attendance rate at religious services is an important variable for the sociology and economics of religion, but long-term and global data are scarce. Retrospective questions from the International Social Survey Program (ISSP) allow the construction of rates of religious-service attendance back as far as the 1920s in 66 countries, half from the “Global South.” A number of checks support the reliability of the retrospective information. One exercise demonstrates the consistency between retrospective and contemporaneous survey data when the two overlap. Another procedure shows that the retrospective values are similar when generated from individual ISSP surveys for 1991, 1998, 2008, and 2018; that is, there is no clear dependence of memory on the number of years of recall. The new data document a century-long “Great Religious Divergence” between North and South. We use the data to carry out event studies for effects on religious-service attendance of two major events. Vatican II, in 1962-1965, triggered a decline in worldwide Catholic attendance relative to that in other denominations. In contrast, the endings of Communism in the early 1990s did not systematically affect religious-service attendance. Finally, in a large sample, religious-service attendance responds positively to wars and depressions.
34060.zh_abstract: 宗教服务出席率是宗教社会学和经济学中的一个重要变量，但长期和全球数据稀缺。国际社会调查项目（ISSP）中的回顾性问题允许构建66个国家（其中一半来自“全球南方”）自20世纪20年代以来的宗教服务出席率。多项检验支持回顾性信息的可靠性。一项练习展示了回顾性调查数据与同期调查数据在重叠时的一致性。另一项程序表明，从1991年、1998年、2008年和2018年的个人ISSP调查中生成的回顾性数值相似；也就是说，记忆对回忆年数没有明显的依赖性。新数据记录了南北之间长达一个世纪的“大宗教分歧”。我们利用这些数据对两个重大事件对宗教服务出席率的影响进行了事件研究。1962-1965年的梵蒂冈第二次大公会议引发了全球天主教出席率相对于其他教派的下降。相比之下，1990年代初共产主义的终结并未系统性地影响宗教服务出席率。最后，在一个大样本中，宗教服务出席率对战争和经济萧条有正向反应。

34059.title: Tax Reform and the Laffer Curve
34059.authors: Ana Gamarra Rondinel, James R. Hines Jr., José F. Sanz-Sanz
34059.abstract: This paper evaluates Laffer curves produced by reforms to nonlinear income taxes, focusing on individual taxpayers. A reform puts a taxpayer on the “wrong” side of the Laffer curve if it increases their tax burden while reducing tax payments. There always exist potential reforms with this property – and in particular, tax increases restricted to high-income taxpayers are guaranteed to consign some to the wrong side of the Laffer curve. The original design of the 2024 Australian tax reform would have put 15% of the taxpaying population on the wrong side of the Laffer curve, though subsequent modifications reduced this to 5%. Standard tax progressivity measures that ignore the endogeneity of taxable income generally understate the redistributive impact of progressive tax reforms.
34059.zh_abstract: 本文评估了非线性所得税改革所产生的拉弗曲线，重点关注个人纳税人。如果一项改革增加了纳税人的税负同时减少了税收收入，则该改革使纳税人处于拉弗曲线的“错误”一侧。总是存在具有此属性的潜在改革——特别是，仅限于高收入纳税人的增税措施必然会使一些人处于拉弗曲线的错误一侧。2024年澳大利亚税制改革的原始设计会使15%的纳税人口处于拉弗曲线的错误一侧，尽管随后的修改将其降至5%。忽略应税收入内生性的标准税收累进性指标通常低估了累进税制改革的再分配影响。

34058.title: The Racial Penalty in Job Ladder Transitions
34058.zh_title: 职业阶梯转换中的种族惩罚
34058.authors: Itzik Fadlon, Briana Sullivan, Vedant Vohra
34058.abstract: We study the role of job transitions and firm pay policies in the Black-White earnings gap in the US. We use administrative data for the universe of employer-employee matches from 2005-2019 to analyze worker mobility in a general but tractable framework, which allows for firm effects that depend on workers’ job history. Using differences in average pay between origin and destination firms as the treatment intensity of a job move, we analyze transitions up and down the job ladder and estimate race-specific passthrough rates of average firm pay into a mover’s own earnings. First, we find race-specific asymmetry around the direction of the move, whereby losses experienced in downward transitions are meaningfully larger than gains from upward transitions with a similar treatment intensity. For a $\$1$ earnings increase in transitions up the job ladder, earnings passthroughs in transitions down the job ladder impose an earnings loss of $\$1.25$ among White workers and $\$1.50$ among Black workers. Second, we uncover career setbacks as a novel pathway in the evolution of racial earnings gaps. In transitions down the job ladder, Black workers lose an additional $\$0.24$ for every $\$1$ decrease in White workers’ earnings, a finding which prevails across sex and age. This “racial penalty” is not driven by differential pay, as it is completely absent when Black and White workers move between the same firm pairs. Instead, the penalty is due to differential sorting following career setbacks, so that Black workers regain employment in “worse” jobs, with strong evidence for racial differences in access to short-run liquidity as a mechanism. Overall, our findings offer a robust and computationally simple framework for modeling earnings determination processes and have implications for safety-net policies in the American labor market.
34058.zh_abstract: 我们研究了工作转换和公司薪酬政策在美国黑人与白人收入差距中的作用。我们使用2005-2019年全美雇主-雇员匹配数据，在一个通用但易于处理的框架中分析工人流动性，该框架允许公司效应取决于工人的工作历史。使用起点和终点公司平均薪酬之间的差异作为工作变动的处理强度，我们分析了职业阶梯的向上和向下转换，并估计了特定种族的平均公司薪酬向流动者自身收入的传导率。首先，我们发现了围绕移动方向的特定种族不对称性，即向下转换中经历的损失显著大于具有类似处理强度的向上转换中的收益。对于职业阶梯向上转换中每1美元的收入增长，向下转换中的收入传导导致白人工人损失1.25美元，黑人工人损失1.50美元。其次，我们揭示了职业挫折是种族收入差距演变中的一个新途径。在职业阶梯向下转换中，白人工人收入每减少1美元，黑人工人额外损失0.24美元，这一发现在性别和年龄组中普遍存在。这种“种族惩罚”并非由薪酬差异驱动，因为当黑人和白人工人在相同的公司对之间流动时，这种惩罚完全不存在。相反，这种惩罚是由于职业挫折后的差异化分类所致，即黑人工人重新就业于“更差”的工作，有强有力的证据表明种族在获得短期流动性方面存在差异作为机制。总体而言，我们的发现为建模收入决定过程提供了一个稳健且计算简单的框架，并对美国劳动力市场中的安全网政策具有启示意义。

34057.title: Frontline Leadership: Evidence from American Civil War Captains
34057.zh_title: 一线领导力：来自美国内战连长的证据
34057.authors: Andreas Ferrara, Christian Dippel, Stephan Heblich
34057.abstract: This paper presents new evidence on the critical role of lower-level organizational leaders. Unlike top managers, frontline leaders are essential for implementing organizational strategies by maintaining team cohesion when shirking is profitable for workers. We study this in the context of the Union Army during the U.S. Civil War, using data on 2.2 million soldiers and tracking captains and their 100-soldier companies at weekly frequency throughout the conflict. We estimate leader fixed effects during non-combat weeks to measure leadership quality in a leader value-added framework. We validate this measure by showing that captains were not assigned based on prior unit performance or observable pre-war characteristics. High-quality leaders earned more after the war, but not before, and were more frequently recognized as good leaders in their postwar biographies. Daily event-study estimates around major battles show that better captains significantly reduced desertions in combat. Exploiting quasi-random leader turnover, we find evidence that this effect is causal. Using digitized battle maps, we rule out risk aversion as a mechanism and find instead that better leaders had higher mortality rates, consistent with a leading-by-example explanation. We also document modest learning-by-doing effects. These findings highlight the often-overlooked importance of frontline leadership, where direct supervision and interpersonal influence are strongest.
34057.zh_abstract: 本文提供了关于低层级组织领导关键作用的新证据。与高层管理者不同，一线领导者在工人偷懒有利可图时，通过维持团队凝聚力来执行组织战略，这一点至关重要。我们以美国内战期间的联邦军队为背景进行研究，使用了220万士兵的数据，并在整个战争期间以周为单位追踪连长及其百人连队。我们在非战斗周估计领导者固定效应，以在领导者增值框架中衡量领导质量。我们通过显示连长并非根据先前部队表现或可观察的战前特征进行分配来验证这一衡量标准。高质量的领导者战后收入更高，但战前并非如此，并且在战后传记中更常被认定为优秀领导者。围绕重大战役的每日事件研究估计表明，更优秀的连长显著减少了战斗中的逃兵行为。利用准随机的领导者更替，我们发现这一效应是因果性的证据。通过使用数字化战役地图，我们排除了风险规避作为机制，反而发现更好的领导者死亡率更高，这与以身作则的解释一致。我们还记录了适度的干中学效应。这些发现突显了一线领导力常被忽视的重要性，因为直接监督和人际影响在此处最为强烈。

34056.title: A Trade-off Between Monetary Policy Transmission and Systemic Risk in China
34056.zh_title: 中国货币政策传导与系统性风险之间的权衡
34056.authors: Kaiji Chen, Yiqing Xiao, Tao Zha
34056.abstract: We examine how interbank wholesale funding shapes the transmission of interest-rate-based monetary policy in China and contributes to systemic risk. Using a bank-level quarterly panel dataset and an estimated policy rule for the 7-day repo rate, we find that access to wholesale funding amplifies the transmission of monetary policy easing to lending by non-state banks, but also heightens their vulnerability to systemic risk during economic downturns. Since 2018, non-state banks with greater reliance on wholesale funding have experienced larger increases in expected capital shortfalls. To interpret these findings, we develop a structural model that incorporates a dual-track interest rate system and a segmented deposit market. The model quantifies the role of a liquidity reallocation channel from state to non-state banks and reveals a macroprudential trade-off: tighter regulation of wholesale funding weakens the effectiveness of monetary policy but mitigates systemic risk.
34056.zh_abstract: 我们研究了银行间批发融资如何塑造中国基于利率的货币政策传导，并如何导致系统性风险。利用银行层面的季度面板数据集和7天回购利率的估计政策规则，我们发现，获得批发融资放大了货币政策宽松向非国有银行贷款的传导，但也加剧了它们在经济下行期间对系统性风险的脆弱性。自2018年以来，更依赖批发融资的非国有银行预期资本缺口增幅更大。为解释这些发现，我们构建了一个包含双轨利率体系和分割存款市场的结构模型。该模型量化了从国有银行到非国有银行的流动性再分配渠道的作用，并揭示了一种宏观审慎权衡：对批发融资的更严格监管会削弱货币政策的有效性，但能减轻系统性风险。
34056.meta: Programs：AP, DEV, EFG, ME；JEL：E02, E5, G28

34055.title: Targeting Distributional Impacts in the Presence of Behavioral Responses: Lessons from Maritime Emissions Regulation
34055.zh_title: 存在行为反应时瞄准分配效应：来自海洋排放监管的教训
34055.abstract: Targeting distributional impacts is gaining importance in the design of environmental policy. To achieve this, policy makers are adopting advances in air transport models to predict the benefits of air emissions regulation. These models offer policy makers accuracy in the spatial distribution of ambient air quality improvements for a given emissions reduction, but do not take into account behavioral responses to environmental policies. We consider how the failure to account for behavioral responses when making policy predictions may have important implications for the ultimate distributional impact of such policies. We compare the distributional impacts of maritime emission regulation predicted from the policy maker's air transport model to the realized distributional impacts. We then decompose the prediction error from two components: model error, whereby the predictions of air transport models fail to account for behavioral responses of polluting firms, and sorting error, whereby the targeted population migrates.
34055.zh_abstract: 瞄准分配效应在环境政策设计中日益重要。为实现这一目标，政策制定者采用空气传输模型的进展来预测空气排放监管的效益。这些模型为政策制定者提供了给定减排量下环境空气质量改善空间分布的准确性，但未考虑对环境政策的行为反应。我们考虑了在制定政策预测时未能考虑行为反应可能如何对此类政策的最终分配效应产生重要影响。我们将政策制定者空气传输模型预测的海洋排放监管分配效应与实现的分配效应进行了比较。然后，我们将预测误差分解为两个部分：模型误差，即空气传输模型的预测未能考虑污染企业的行为反应；以及分类误差，即目标人口发生了迁移。
34055.meta: Programs：CH, EEE；JEL：Q5, Q51, Q52, Q53, Q58

34054.title: AI-Powered Trading, Algorithmic Collusion, and Price Efficiency
34054.zh_title: 人工智能驱动的交易、算法合谋与价格效率
34054.authors: Winston Wei Dou, Itay Goldstein, Yan Ji
34054.abstract: The integration of algorithmic trading with reinforcement learning, termed AI-powered trading, is transforming financial markets. Alongside the benefits, it raises concerns for collusion. This study first develops a model to explore the possibility of collusion among informed speculators in a theoretical environment. We then conduct simulation experiments, replacing the speculators in the model with informed AI speculators who trade based on reinforcement-learning algorithms. We show that they autonomously sustain collusive supra-competitive profits without agreement, communication, or intent. Such collusion undermines competition and market efficiency. We demonstrate that two separate mechanisms are underlying this collusion and characterize when each one arises.
34054.zh_abstract: 算法交易与强化学习的融合，即人工智能驱动的交易，正在改变金融市场。在带来益处的同时，它也引发了对合谋的担忧。本研究首先构建了一个模型，在理论环境中探索知情投机者之间合谋的可能性。然后，我们进行模拟实验，用基于强化学习算法进行交易的人工智能知情投机者取代模型中的投机者。我们表明，它们在没有协议、沟通或意图的情况下，自主维持了超竞争利润的合谋。这种合谋破坏了竞争和市场效率。我们证明了两种不同的机制是这种合谋的基础，并描述了每种机制何时出现。
34054.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO, LE, PR；JEL：D43, G10, G14, L13

34053.title: Credit Access in the United States
34053.authors: Trevor J. Bakker, Stefanie DeLuca, Eric A. English, James S. Fogel, Nathaniel Hendren, Daniel Herbst
34053.abstract: We construct new population-level linked administrative data to study households’ access to credit in the United States. By age 25, Black adults, those who grew up in low-income families, and those raised in the Southeast or Appalachia already have significantly lower credit scores than other groups, and these differences persist throughout adulthood. These gaps translate into smaller credit balances, more credit inquiries, higher credit utilization, and greater reliance on high-cost alternative financial services. Evaluating two definitions of algorithmic bias yields opposing results. Scores are miscalibrated against traditionally advantaged groups: conditional on a score, Black and low-parental-income individuals fall delinquent more often. Yet scores are unbalanced against traditionally disadvantaged groups: among borrowers with no future delinquency, Black and low-parental-income individuals receive lower scores. Eliminating both biases and reducing gaps in credit access requires reducing systematic differences in delinquencies, which emerge in one’s twenties through missed payments on credit cards, student loans, and other bills. Comprehensive measures of individuals’ income profiles and observed wealth explain only a small portion of these repayment gaps. In contrast, most geographic variation in repayment reflects the causal effect of childhood exposure to place. Counties that promote upward mobility also promote repayment and expand credit access, suggesting that common place-level factors may drive behaviors in both credit and labor markets. We discuss suggestive evidence for several mechanisms of our results, including the role of social and cultural capital. We conclude that gaps in credit access by race, class, and hometown have roots in childhood environments.
34053.zh_abstract: 我们构建了新的全人口关联行政数据，以研究美国家庭的信贷获取。到25岁时，黑人成年人、来自低收入家庭的人以及在美国东南部或阿巴拉契亚地区长大的人，其信用评分已显著低于其他群体，且这些差异贯穿整个成年期。这些差距转化为更小的信贷余额、更多的信用查询、更高的信贷利用率以及对高成本替代金融服务的更大依赖。评估算法偏差的两种定义得出了相反的结果。评分对传统优势群体校准不当：在给定评分条件下，黑人和低收入父母背景的个体更常出现违约。然而，评分对传统弱势群体不均衡：在无未来违约的借款人中，黑人和低收入父母背景的个体获得更低的评分。消除这两种偏差并缩小信贷获取差距，需要减少违约的系统性差异，这些差异在二十多岁通过信用卡、学生贷款和其他账单的逾期还款而出现。个人收入状况和观察到的财富的综合指标仅能解释这些还款差距的一小部分。相比之下，还款的大部分地理差异反映了童年时期所处地点的因果效应。促进向上流动的县也促进了还款并扩大了信贷获取，这表明共同的地点层面因素可能驱动信贷和劳动力市场中的行为。我们讨论了研究结果的几种机制的证据，包括社会和文化资本的作用。我们得出结论，按种族、阶级和家乡划分的信贷获取差距根植于童年环境。

34052.title: Tariff Reciprocity
34052.authors: James E. Anderson, Yoto V. Yotov
34052.abstract: ‘Effective’ tariff index comparisons are spotlighted in media reports on trade wars and trade talks. Deficiency in the index used for comparisons misleads public opinion and policy makers. We offer an import volume equivalent uniform tariff index to replace the import-weighted average ‘effective’ tariff. Its share weights embody their general equilibrium dependence on all country and product tariffs. Reciprocal reductions in the indexes are: (i) consistent with the objective of reciprocal exchange of market access, and (ii) decompose into the product of buyer and seller incidences of tariffs that reflect domestic political economy objectives.
34052.zh_abstract: “有效”关税指数比较在关于贸易战和贸易谈判的媒体报道中备受关注。用于比较的指数缺陷误导了公众舆论和政策制定者。我们提出了一种进口量等价的统一关税指数，以取代进口加权平均的“有效”关税。其份额权重体现了它们对所有国家和产品关税的一般均衡依赖性。这些指数的互惠性降低：(i) 符合互惠交换市场准入的目标，并且 (ii) 可分解为反映国内政治经济目标的关税买方和卖方发生率的乘积。

34051.title: The Illusion of Time: Gender Gaps in Job Search and Employment
34051.zh_title: 时间的错觉：求职与就业中的性别差距
34051.authors: Oriana Bandiera, Amen Jalal, Nina Roussille
34051.abstract: Even in traditional societies, men and women graduate from college at increasingly similar rates. Yet their paths diverge upon labor market entry: men work while most women stay home. What drives this divergence? Tracking 2,400 college students in Pakistan, we show that men and women hold similarly high work aspirations at graduation and subsequently apply to jobs and receive offers at comparable rates. Yet a 27 pp gender employment gap emerges within six months, driven by women rejecting offers far more often than men. A key predictor of women’s job acceptance decision is the timing of search: those who apply within two months of graduation are much more likely to be employed later. To test causality and uncover mechanisms, we randomize a modest incentive to apply early. The intervention shifts search earlier for both genders, raises women’s employment by ∼20% while leaving men’s unaffected, thereby closing a third of the gender gap. Employment gains are concentrated among women who underestimate how soon marriage activities arise, revealing that they delayed job search under an “illusion of time.” For these women, early job search can initiate a self-reinforcing cycle: by entering the labor force before the marriage market, they attract more progressive suitors, which in turn can create a more supportive environment for sustained employment.
34051.zh_abstract: 即使在传统社会中，男女大学毕业率也日益趋同。然而，他们在进入劳动力市场后道路出现分歧：男性工作，而大多数女性待在家里。是什么导致了这种分歧？通过追踪巴基斯坦2400名大学生，我们表明，男性和女性在毕业时持有同样高的工作抱负，随后申请工作和获得录用通知的比率也相当。然而，在六个月内出现了27个百分点的性别就业差距，这是由于女性拒绝录用通知的频率远高于男性。女性接受工作决定的一个关键预测因素是求职时机：那些在毕业后两个月内申请的人更有可能在之后就业。为了检验因果关系并揭示机制，我们随机化了一个适度的激励措施以鼓励早期申请。该干预措施使两性的求职时间都提前，使女性就业率提高了约20%，而对男性就业率没有影响，从而缩小了三分之一的性别差距。就业增长集中在那些低估了婚姻活动何时出现的女性中，这表明她们在“时间错觉”下推迟了求职。对于这些女性来说，早期求职可以启动一个自我强化的循环：通过在婚姻市场之前进入劳动力市场，她们吸引了更进步的追求者，这反过来可以为持续就业创造一个更具支持性的环境。
34051.meta: Programs：DEV, LS；JEL：I25, J16, J21, J64, O15

34050.title: Beyond Bonferroni: Multiple Testing in Empirical Research
34050.zh_title: 超越邦费罗尼：实证研究中的分层多重检验
34050.abstract: This paper offers a general, practical review of methods for dealing with multiple hypothesis testing, aimed at applied researchers who must draw inference on multiple outcomes, subgroups, or model specifications but often lack clear guidance on how to proceed. We distill key lessons from the methodological literature, explain why several common practices are flawed, and clarify the guarantees provided by alternative approaches. Beyond standard corrections such as Bonferroni, Holm, and false discovery rate controls, we emphasize the value of hierarchical procedures that exploit causal or logical structure to deliver more powerful and interpretable results. By linking these tools to real applications, we translate methodological advances into accessible guidance and provide researchers with a clear roadmap for producing credible, transparent, and policy-relevant empirical work.
34050.zh_abstract: 本文为处理多重假设检验的方法提供了一份通用且实用的综述，旨在帮助那些必须对多个结果、子群体或模型设定进行推断，但往往缺乏明确操作指南的应用研究人员。我们从方法论文献中提炼关键教训，解释了几种常见做法的缺陷，并阐明了替代方法所提供的保证。除了邦费罗尼、霍尔姆和错误发现率控制等标准校正方法外，我们强调了利用因果或逻辑结构的分层程序的价值，这些程序能提供更强大且更易解释的结果。通过将这些工具与实际应用联系起来，我们将方法论进展转化为易于理解的指导，并为研究人员提供了一条清晰的路线图，以产生可信、透明且与政策相关的实证工作。

34049.title: Economic Crisis and Disillusionment from Socialism: Evidence From a Quasi-Natural Experiment
34049.zh_title: 经济危机与社会主义幻灭：来自准自然实验的证据
34049.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Netanel Ben Porath, Victor Lavy, Michal Palgi
34049.abstract: While many socialist countries suffered from harsh economic crises, studying their impacts on economic and political attitudes is challenging because of the scarcity of reliable data in nondemocratic contexts. We study a democratic socialist setting where we have ample information on such attitudes: the Israeli kibbutzim. Exploiting an economic crisis that hit some kibbutzim more than others, we find that the crisis led to reduced support for leftist political parties. This effect persisted for over 20 years after the crisis had ended. We document that the electoral movement was rooted in a rightward shift in economic attitudes, suggesting that economic crises may undermine socialist regimes by silently changing attitudes toward them. In our unique setting, we can also study recovery mechanisms from the crisis. First, we find that while a sharp debt relief arrangement restored trust in the leadership, it did not reverse the impact of the crisis on economic attitudes. Second, as part of their efforts to recover from the crisis, kibbutzim liberalized their labor markets. Analyzing the staggered shift away from equal sharing to market-based wages, we find that this labor market liberalization led kibbutz members to move further rightward in their political voting and economic attitudes.
34049.zh_abstract: 尽管许多社会主义国家曾遭受严重的经济危机，但由于在非民主背景下缺乏可靠数据，研究这些危机对经济和政治态度的影响颇具挑战性。我们研究了一个民主社会主义环境——以色列基布兹，在此环境中我们拥有关于此类态度的丰富信息。利用一场对部分基布兹冲击更为严重的经济危机，我们发现危机导致对左翼政党的支持率下降。这一效应在危机结束后持续了二十多年。我们记录到，选举动向根植于经济态度的右转，这表明经济危机可能通过悄然改变人们对社会主义制度的态度来削弱该制度。在我们的独特环境中，我们还能研究危机后的恢复机制。首先，我们发现，尽管一项急剧的债务减免安排恢复了对领导层的信任，但它并未逆转危机对经济态度的影响。其次，作为危机恢复努力的一部分，基布兹对其劳动力市场进行了自由化改革。通过分析从平均分配向市场化工资的逐步转变，我们发现这种劳动力市场自由化导致基布兹成员在政治投票和经济态度上进一步右倾。
34049.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：J0

34048.title: ESG Aversion: Experimental Evidence on Perceptions and Preferences
34048.zh_title: ESG厌恶：关于认知与偏好的实验证据
34048.abstract: We develop an experimental framework to separate belief- from taste-based demand for Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) partnerships. In two symmetric experiments with real startup founders and VC investors, we found evidence of significant ESG penalty: profiles randomly labeled as ESG received less interest from both sides, driven by beliefs that ESG partners are less profitable and accessible. A willingness-to-pay task then revealed a latent taste for ESG: participants sacrificed lottery payoffs to receive additional match recommendations of ESG-oriented partners when profitability was held fixed. Overall, the evidence shows a market tension: performance concerns obscure an underlying taste for ESG.
34048.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个实验框架，以区分基于信念和基于偏好的环境、社会和治理（ESG）合作需求。在两项对称实验中，我们与真实的初创企业创始人和风险投资家合作，发现了显著的ESG惩罚证据：随机标注为ESG的档案从双方获得的兴趣都较低，这源于认为ESG合作伙伴盈利能力较差且难以接触的信念。随后的一项支付意愿任务揭示了潜在的ESG偏好：当盈利能力固定时，参与者牺牲彩票收益以换取更多ESG导向合作伙伴的匹配推荐。总体而言，证据显示了一种市场张力：对业绩的担忧掩盖了潜在的ESG偏好。
34048.meta: Programs：CF, EEE, PR；JEL：C91, C93, G24, L26, M13, Q56

34047.title: Hot Weather, Undernutrition, and Adaptation in Rural India
34047.zh_title: 高温天气、营养不良与印度农村的适应措施
34047.authors: Paul Stainier, Manisha Shah, Alan Barreca
34047.abstract: We examine the impact of temperature during the growing season on household diets in the subsequent year in rural India, a setting with a high prevalence of small family farms. High growing season temperatures reduce crop yields, which would presumably reduce incomes and home-grown food for consumption. However, household adaptation could mitigate how the reductions in yields affect diets. We find that heat increases the number of strongly undernourished households in the subsequent year, as measured by the consumption of calories, iron, zinc, thiamine, and niacin. We also find suggestive evidence that households adapt to heat-induced losses of home-grown crops by purchasing more food.
