34047.zh_abstract: 我们研究了生长季节温度对印度农村家庭次年饮食的影响，该地区小规模家庭农场普遍存在。生长季节的高温会降低作物产量，这可能会减少家庭收入和自产食物消费。然而，家庭适应措施可能缓解产量下降对饮食的影响。我们发现，高温导致次年严重营养不良家庭的数量增加，以卡路里、铁、锌、硫胺素和烟酸的消费量衡量。我们还发现提示性证据表明，家庭通过购买更多食物来适应高温导致的自家作物损失。

34046.title: The Benefits of Scholastic Athletics
34046.authors: James J. Heckman, Colleen P. Loughlin, Haihan Tian
34046.abstract: This paper uses longitudinal data to study the benefits of participation in scholastic athletics starting with high school participation and continuing with college athletics, including the benefits of intramural athletics. We study the impact of participation on a number of important life outcomes, including graduation from high school and college and wages after schooling is completed. Controlling for rich measures of cognitive and personality skills and social background, we find substantial benefits at all levels. Participation in athletics promotes social mobility for disadvantaged and minority students.
34046.zh_abstract: 本文利用纵向数据研究参与学校体育运动的益处，从高中参与开始，延续到大学体育，包括校内体育的益处。我们研究了参与对一系列重要人生结果的影响，包括高中和大学毕业率以及完成学业后的工资。在控制了丰富的认知能力、人格技能和社会背景指标后，我们发现各个层面都有显著益处。参与体育运动促进了弱势学生和少数族裔学生的社会流动性。

34045.title: Misconduct Synergies
34045.abstract: Do corporate control transactions discipline the labor force? Consistent with synergies, new disclosures of employee misconduct in the investment advisory industry drop by between 17 and 22 percent following mergers. Both targets and acquirers have better pre-merger misconduct records than the industry’s average firm and, within the subsample of merging firms, there is assortative matching on misconduct. Merger events facilitate further reductions in misconduct through separations of target firm employees with high misconduct. Many of these employees remain in the industry, suggesting that consolidation plays an important role in the redistribution of misconduct across firms.
34045.zh_abstract: 企业控制权交易是否会对劳动力进行约束？与协同效应一致，投资咨询行业在并购后新披露的员工不当行为下降了17%至22%。目标公司和收购方在并购前的不当行为记录均优于行业平均水平，并且在并购公司的子样本中，存在基于不当行为的选型匹配。并购事件通过分离目标公司中不当行为高的员工，进一步促进了不当行为的减少。这些员工中有许多人仍留在该行业，这表明整合在不当行为跨企业重新分配中扮演了重要角色。

34044.title: The Aggregate Welfare and Trade Implications of Contracting Frictions in Global Sourcing
34044.zh_title: 全球采购中契约摩擦的总体福利与贸易影响
34044.abstract: How much do contracting frictions between global firms and their suppliers impact country welfare and trade? We answer this by developing a model of global sourcing under partial contractibility, where firm-supplier relationships are exposed to a bilateral holdup problem. Sourcing decisions aggregate into a gravity equation for trade flows by organizational mode (intrafirm vs. arm’s length), which we take to structural estimation. We can then evaluate welfare changes with an extended Arkolakis, Costinot and Rodriguez-Clare (2012) formula that incorporates these contracting frictions. Our counterfactual analysis reveals a sizeable average country welfare gain of 9.2% from eliminating contracting frictions in global sourcing. We further show how accounting for these frictions significantly reshapes quantitative assessments of the welfare gains from trade, including the stakes in a US-China decoupling scenario.
34044.zh_abstract: 全球企业与其供应商之间的契约摩擦对一国福利和贸易影响有多大？我们通过构建一个部分可契约性下的全球采购模型来回答这个问题，其中企业与供应商的关系面临双边敲竹杠问题。采购决策汇总为按组织模式（公司内贸易与公平贸易）划分的贸易流引力方程，我们将其用于结构估计。然后，我们可以利用扩展的Arkolakis、Costinot和Rodriguez-Clare（2012）公式来评估福利变化，该公式纳入了这些契约摩擦。我们的反事实分析显示，消除全球采购中的契约摩擦平均可带来9.2%的显著国家福利增益。我们进一步表明，考虑这些摩擦会显著改变对贸易福利增益的量化评估，包括美中脱钩情景中的利害关系。

34043.title: How Do Tax Incentives Influence Employer Decisions to Offer Retirement Benefits?
34043.zh_title: 税收激励如何影响雇主提供退休福利的决策？
34043.authors: Adam Bloomfield, Lucas Goodman, Shanthi Ramnath, Sita Slavov
34043.abstract: In recent years, policy makers have adopted many measures to incentivize the establishment of employer-sponsored retirement plans (ESRPs). One such measure – implemented in the early 2000s and made more generous in recent years – allows smaller firms that establish an ESRP to claim a tax credit to offset part of their costs during the initial years. We examine firm take-up of this credit. We find that only 1.1 percent (pre-policy expansion) to 7.2 percent (post-policy expansion) of apparently eligible firms claim the credit. We document heterogeneity in credit take-up rates by industry, firm owner education, and use of tax preparation services. We also document evidence of “tax preparer learning,” whereby take-up among a tax preparer’s clients increases after that preparer files their first credit. Finally, we document that most firms only claim the credit for one year despite being eligible to do so for up to three years.
34043.zh_abstract: 近年来，政策制定者采取了多项措施来激励建立雇主资助的退休计划（ESRP）。其中一项措施——于21世纪初实施并在近年变得更加慷慨——允许建立ESRP的小型企业在最初几年申请税收抵免，以抵消部分成本。我们研究了企业对这项抵免的采用情况。我们发现，在明显符合条件的企业中，只有1.1%（政策扩展前）到7.2%（政策扩展后）申请了这项抵免。我们记录了按行业、企业主教育程度和税务准备服务使用情况划分的抵免采用率异质性。我们还发现了“税务准备者学习”的证据，即税务准备者的客户中采用率在该准备者首次提交抵免申请后有所增加。最后，我们记录到，尽管大多数企业有资格申请长达三年的抵免，但它们只申请了一年。

34042.title: Helping Schools Survive: Experimental Evidence on the Impact of Financial and Educational Support to Private Schools
34042.zh_title: 帮助学校生存：金融与教育支持对私立学校影响的实验证据
34042.authors: Tahir Andrabi, Jishnu Das, Asim Ijaz Khwaja, Selcuk Ozyurt
34042.abstract: Low-cost private schools have increased educational access in low-income countries, but frequent school closures lead to costly disruptions in children’s schooling. We provide experimental evidence from Pakistan that both school loans and educational products and services (EPS) are (a) commercially viable products and (b) substantially and similarly improve school survival rates. Moreover, loans decrease closure rates more for schools with larger initial enrollments and lower baseline test scores, while EPS show no such differential impact. These results demonstrate how financial and educational input constraints can significantly affect school survival while underscoring that the fungibility of entrepreneurial support matters.
34042.zh_abstract: 低成本私立学校增加了低收入国家的教育机会，但频繁的学校关闭导致儿童学业的中断代价高昂。我们提供了来自巴基斯坦的实验证据，表明学校贷款和教育产品与服务（EPS）两者（a）都是商业上可行的产品，并且（b）显著且类似地提高了学校生存率。此外，对于初始入学人数较多且基线考试成绩较低的学校，贷款更能降低关闭率，而EPS则没有显示出这种差异化影响。这些结果展示了金融和教育投入约束如何显著影响学校生存，同时强调了创业支持的可替代性至关重要。

34041.title: Green Business Cycles
34041.authors: Diego R. Känzig, Maximilian Konradt, Lixing Wang, Donghai Zhang
34041.abstract: This paper examines the relationship between green innovation and the business cycle, revealing that while non-green innovation is procyclical, green innovation is countercyclical. This pattern holds unconditionally over the business cycle and conditional on economic shocks. Motivated by these findings, we develop a business cycle model with endogenous green and non-green innovation to explain their distinct cyclical behavior. The key mechanism operates through a ‘green is in the future’ channel: green patents are expected to generate higher profits in the future, making green patenting less sensitive to short-term economic fluctuations. In general equilibrium, this channel is reinforced, making green and non-green innovation effective substitutes. We provide direct evidence supporting the model mechanism using data on market-implied values of green and non-green patents.
34041.zh_abstract: 本文研究了绿色创新与商业周期之间的关系，揭示出非绿色创新是顺周期的，而绿色创新则是逆周期的。这一模式在商业周期中无条件成立，并且在经济冲击条件下也成立。受这些发现启发，我们构建了一个包含内生绿色和非绿色创新的商业周期模型，以解释它们截然不同的周期行为。关键机制通过“绿色在未来”渠道运作：绿色专利预期将在未来产生更高利润，这使得绿色专利申请对短期经济波动不那么敏感。在一般均衡中，这一渠道得到强化，使绿色和非绿色创新成为有效的替代品。我们利用市场隐含的绿色和非绿色专利价值数据，为模型机制提供了直接证据。
34041.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, ME, PR；JEL：E32, O31, Q55, Q58

34040.title: The Impact of Unconditional Cash Transfers on Parenting and Children
34040.zh_title: 无条件现金转移对养育方式和儿童的影响
34040.authors: Patrick K. Krause, Elizabeth Rhodes, Sarah Miller, Alexander W. Bartik, David E. Broockman, Eva Vivalt
34040.abstract: This paper examines the impact of a large, randomized cash transfer on parental behaviors, investment in children, children’s social, behavioral, and educational outcomes, and pregnancy and childbearing. We find that parents who were randomly selected to receive a $\$1,000$ per month unconditional cash transfer for three years spent more on their children each month and reported better parenting behaviors (such as supervising their children more closely) compared to those randomized to receive $\$50$ per month over the same period. However, possibly due to this closer monitoring, parents in the treatment group also reported that their child was experiencing more developmental difficulties and stress. Parents with the lowest baseline incomes experienced the largest improvements in parenting; among these parents, the transfer also increased the use and quality of non-parental child care. The transfer did not have a meaningful effect on most educational outcomes measured in school administrative records, nor did it affect characteristics of the home environment, child food security, exposure to homelessness, or parental satisfaction. Although treated families were more likely to move, we did not detect changes in most measures of neighborhood quality, though proximity to child-focused amenities such as daycares appeared to increase in the treatment group relative to the control group. The transfer did not affect childbearing, pregnancy, or outcomes related to contraception. While the transfer reduced parents’ stress and mental distress in the first year of the program, these effects were short-lived and dissipated by the second year of the transfer, analogous to what was documented previously in the full population of participants.
34040.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一项大规模随机现金转移对父母行为、对子女的投资、子女的社会、行为和教育结果以及怀孕和生育的影响。我们发现，随机被选中在三年内每月获得1000美元无条件现金转移的父母，与在同一时期每月获得50美元的父母相比，每月在子女身上花费更多，并报告了更好的养育行为（例如更密切地监督子女）。然而，可能由于这种更密切的监督，治疗组的父母也报告说他们的孩子正在经历更多的发展困难和压力。基线收入最低的父母在养育方面改善最大；在这些父母中，转移支付也增加了非父母托儿服务的使用和质量。转移支付对学校行政记录中衡量的大多数教育结果没有显著影响，也没有影响家庭环境特征、儿童食品安全、无家可归经历或父母满意度。尽管受治疗家庭更有可能搬家，但我们没有检测到大多数邻里质量指标的变化，尽管与对照组相比，治疗组靠近日托所等儿童友好设施的程度似乎有所增加。转移支付没有影响生育、怀孕或与避孕相关的结果。虽然转移支付在项目第一年减轻了父母的压力和心理健康困扰，但这些影响是短暂的，并在转移支付的第二年消失，这与之前在全部参与者中记录的情况类似。

34039.title: Are Hospital Acquisitions of Physician Practices Anticompetitive?
34039.zh_title: 医院收购医生诊所是否具有反竞争性？
34039.authors: Zack Cooper, Stuart V. Craig, Aristotelis Epanomeritakis, Matthew Grennan, Joseph R. Martinez, Fiona Scott Morton, Ashley T. Swanson
34039.abstract: This paper empirically analyzes the effects of mergers between complementary firms on competition and pricing. As these non-horizontal mergers have become more common, there is increasing interest in evaluating both potential efficiencies such as eliminating double marginalization and potential anticompetitive effects such as foreclosure and recapture. The mergers we study – hospital acquisitions of physician practices – have reshaped the $\$1$ trillion US physician industry, nearly doubling the share of physicians working for hospitals between 2008 and 2016. We combine novel data and machine learning algorithms to identify a large number of integration events, spanning a wide range of markets with different competitive circumstances. We merge the integration events with claims data from a large national insurer to study their effects on prices. Focusing on childbirths, the most ubiquitous admission among the privately insured, we find that, on average, these mergers led to price increases for hospitals and physicians of 3.3% and 15.1%, respectively, with no discernible effects on quality measures. Using demand estimation to characterize substitution patterns for both physicians and hospitals, we construct tests that demonstrate price increases are larger among transactions with greater scope for foreclosure and recapture. Our estimates suggest that the costs of these mergers of hospitals and physicians have been substantial, and our mechanism tests offer guidance in predicting where the anticompetitive effects of non-horizontal mergers are likely to be strongest.
34039.zh_abstract: 本文实证分析了互补企业之间合并对竞争和定价的影响。随着这些非横向合并变得越来越普遍，评估潜在效率（如消除双重边际化）和潜在反竞争效应（如封锁和回收）的兴趣日益增加。我们研究的合并——医院收购医生诊所——已经重塑了价值1万亿美元的美国医生行业，在2008年至2016年间，为医院工作的医生比例几乎翻了一番。我们结合新颖的数据和机器学习算法，识别了大量整合事件，涵盖了具有不同竞争环境的广泛市场。我们将整合事件与一家大型国家保险公司的索赔数据合并，以研究它们对价格的影响。聚焦于分娩——私人保险中最普遍的入院原因——我们发现，平均而言，这些合并导致医院和医生的价格分别上涨了3.3%和15.1%，而对质量指标没有明显影响。通过使用需求估计来描述医生和医院的替代模式，我们构建了检验，表明在具有更大封锁和回收空间的交易中，价格上涨幅度更大。我们的估计表明，这些医院与医生合并的成本是巨大的，而我们的机制检验为指导预测非横向合并的反竞争效应最可能发生在何处提供了依据。

34082.title: Can Author Manipulation of AI Referees be Welfare Improving?
34082.zh_title: 作者操纵AI审稿人能提升福利吗？
34082.abstract: This paper examines a new moral hazard in delegated decision-making: authors can embed hidden instructions—known as prompt injections—to bias AI referees in academic peer review. If AI reviews are inexpensive, referees may delegate fully. If AI quality is low, this leads to market collapse. The paper shows that the possibility of manipulation, combined with moderate detection, can paradoxically improve welfare in this low-quality regime. With intermediate detection probabilities, only low-quality authors undertake manipulation, and detection becomes informative about quality, inducing referees to mix between manual and AI reviews. This mixed-strategy equilibrium disciplines referees and generates information, potentially sustaining the market when AI quality is low. However, this benefit vanishes when AI quality is intermediate or high; in these cases, strong detection is optimal as it enables an efficient pure AI market. Thus, prompt injection can play a welfare-enhancing role, but only when AI reviews are easily produced but insufficiently accurate. The results highlight a non-monotonic relationship between enforcement and welfare in the presence of weak AI technologies.
34082.zh_abstract: 本文研究了委托决策中的一种新型道德风险：作者可以嵌入隐藏指令（即提示注入）来偏倚学术同行评审中的AI审稿人。如果AI评审成本低廉，审稿人可能完全委托给AI。若AI质量低下，这将导致市场崩溃。本文表明，操纵的可能性与适度的检测相结合，反而能在低质量情境下改善福利。在中等检测概率下，只有低质量作者会进行操纵，而检测本身成为质量的信号，促使审稿人在人工评审与AI评审之间混合策略。这种混合策略均衡约束了审稿人并产生信息，从而在AI质量低下时可能维持市场运转。然而，当AI质量处于中等或高水平时，这一收益消失；在这些情况下，强检测是最优的，因为它能实现高效的纯AI市场。因此，提示注入可以发挥提升福利的作用，但仅限于AI评审易于生成但准确性不足的情形。结果凸显了在AI技术薄弱时，执法力度与福利之间存在非单调关系。

34081.title: Equilibrium Particulate Exposure
34081.authors: Lorenzo Aldeco, Lint Barrage, Matthew Turner
34081.abstract: We assemble global, spatially disaggregated panel data on ambient particulates, population, and economic activity, and develop a macroeconomic integrated assessment model of particulate exposure for 30 countries representing 60\\% of world population. The data indicate the importance of country level factors in determining particulate exposure. Model results indicate the importance of equilibrium adjustments. For example, uncompensated oil taxes and agricultural burning restrictions may unintentionally raise exposure by shifting labor to dirtier sectors or locations. Model results also showcase the importance of country heterogeneity and fiscal management. Our results suggest that effective particulates policy requires accounting for general equilibrium responses.
34081.zh_abstract: 我们收集了全球空间细分的颗粒物、人口和经济活动面板数据，并为占世界人口60%的30个国家开发了一个宏观经济综合评估模型，用于分析颗粒物暴露。数据表明国家层面因素在决定颗粒物暴露中的重要性。模型结果凸显了均衡调整的重要性。例如，未补偿的石油税和农业焚烧限制可能通过将劳动力转移到更脏的行业或地区而无意中增加暴露。模型结果还展示了国家异质性和财政管理的重要性。我们的结果表明，有效的颗粒物政策需要考虑一般均衡反应。

34080.title: Carbon Taxes and Green Subsidies in a World Economy
34080.zh_title: 世界经济中的碳税与绿色补贴
34080.abstract: We examine positive and normative questions that arise with the joint use of carbon taxes and green subsidies in an open economy. Moving from autarky to free trade induces countries to introduce green subsidies and reduce carbon taxes, in order to reduce foreign emissions. In contrast to the “leakage” effect of carbon taxes, green subsidies are associated with “reverse leakage,” as they decrease emissions both at home and abroad, and as a consequence, the availability of green subsidies tends to be good for global welfare. International climate agreements (ICAs) seek to increase carbon taxes, but the effect on green subsidies is more nuanced. An ICA removes green subsidies, even though they exert positive international externalities at the noncooperative equilibrium. If, however, policies can only be changed gradually, an ICA may start by increasing subsidies before decreasing them over time. We also consider the welfare implications of lobbying from the fossil and green energy sectors. In a noncooperative setting, we find that pressures from the fossil lobby tend to reduce welfare, whereas pressures from the green lobby tend to increase welfare. We also find that in the presence of lobbying, an ICA can decrease welfare relative to the noncooperative equilibrium, even if it changes carbon taxes and green subsidies toward their efficient levels.
34080.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在开放经济中同时使用碳税和绿色补贴所带来的实证与规范性问题。从自给自足转向自由贸易会促使各国引入绿色补贴并降低碳税，以减少外国排放。与碳税的“泄漏”效应不同，绿色补贴伴随着“反向泄漏”，因为它们同时减少国内和国外的排放，因此绿色补贴的可得性往往有利于全球福利。国际气候协议旨在提高碳税，但对绿色补贴的影响更为微妙。尽管绿色补贴在非合作均衡中产生正的国际外部性，国际气候协议却会取消它们。然而，如果政策只能逐步改变，国际气候协议可能先增加补贴，再随时间减少。我们还考虑了化石能源和绿色能源部门游说的福利影响。在非合作环境下，我们发现化石游说的压力倾向于降低福利，而绿色游说的压力倾向于提高福利。我们还发现，在存在游说的情况下，即使国际气候协议将碳税和绿色补贴调整至有效水平，它也可能相对于非合作均衡降低福利。
34080.meta: Programs：CF, EEE, ITI, PE；JEL：F18, H2, Q48, Q5

34079.title: The Role of Industrial Policy in the Renewable Energy Sector
34079.zh_title: 产业政策在可再生能源部门中的作用
34079.authors: Todd D. Gerarden, Mar Reguant, Daniel Xu
34079.abstract: Renewable electricity generation technology costs have fallen dramatically, investment has grown rapidly, and renewables are now a pillar of climate and decarbonization policy. Part of the credit for these trends goes to environmental policy efforts to support renewable energy as a substitute to fossil energy. The recent rise in protectionism, industrial policy, and geopolitical tensions has the potential to either undermine or enhance these environmental policy objectives. In this paper, we provide an overview of renewable energy economics and policy, with a focus on solar and wind power. We outline theoretical rationales for industrial policy and review recent empirical research, paying particular attention to how renewable energy policies have generated spillovers across firms and countries. We close by highlighting how this recent evidence can inform ongoing industrial policy debates.
34079.zh_abstract: 可再生能源发电技术成本大幅下降，投资快速增长，可再生能源现已成为气候和脱碳政策的支柱。这些趋势部分归功于支持可再生能源作为化石能源替代品的环境政策努力。近期保护主义、产业政策和地缘政治紧张局势的抬头，有可能削弱或增强这些环境政策目标。本文概述了可再生能源经济学与政策，重点关注太阳能和风能。我们阐述了产业政策的理论依据，并回顾了近期实证研究，特别关注可再生能源政策如何产生跨企业和跨国的溢出效应。最后，我们强调这些近期证据如何为当前的产业政策辩论提供信息。

34078.title: The Risk, Reward, and Asset Allocation of Nonprofit Endowment Funds
34078.zh_title: 非营利组织捐赠基金的风险、回报与资产配置
34078.authors: Andrew W. Lo, Egor V. Matveyev, Stefan Zeume
34078.abstract: Using tax filings from 374,351 U.S. nonprofit organizations from 2008 to 2020, we provide the first large-scale analysis of endowment prevalence, function, asset allocation, and returns. Endowment use varies systematically across sectors and revenue models. Organizations with endowments scale mission-related spending more effectively and hedge revenue risk through asset allocation. Yet most endowments underperform passive benchmarks, with the weakest performance concentrated among smaller, self-managed funds. Advisory fees are positively correlated with gross returns but negatively with net returns, suggesting overpayment for investment services. Stronger governance, lower discretionary spending, and the use of outsourced CIOs are associated with better performance.
34078.zh_abstract: 利用2008年至2020年间374,351家美国非营利组织的税务申报数据，我们首次对捐赠基金的普及程度、功能、资产配置和回报进行了大规模分析。捐赠基金的使用在不同部门和收入模式间存在系统性差异。拥有捐赠基金的组织能更有效地扩展使命相关支出，并通过资产配置对冲收入风险。然而，大多数捐赠基金的表现低于被动基准，表现最差的集中在规模较小、自我管理的基金中。咨询费与总回报正相关，但与净回报负相关，表明投资服务存在超额支付。更强的治理、更低的自由支配支出以及使用外包首席投资官与更好的表现相关。
34078.meta: Programs：AP, CF, PE；JEL：G11, G2, G20, G23, G29

34077.title: Understanding Cultural Change
34077.abstract: Culture’s influence on economic outcomes is no longer controversial among economists even if it remains largely ignored in many areas of economics. This paper tackles a different question: why does culture change? The underlying premise adopted here is that culture changes because incentives change, transforming actions and beliefs. An idiosyncratic review of the literature follows that illustrates how the environment (e.g., the prevalence of pathogens or the suitability of land for pastoralism) and historical experiences (e.g., colonization, war, or migration) can affect relationships of power in society and shape people’s beliefs. It then examines the role of new information and ideas (i.e., learning) and finally the role of policies in shaping incentives and changing culture. A second part of the paper reviews work that models the mechanisms of cultural change more explicitly, using quantitative models to examine the interplay between economic incentives and evolving beliefs or preferences and to study the importance of intermediating mechanisms. Given that one of the most profound cultural and economic transformations of the past 150 years concerns gender roles, this theme recurs throughout.
34077.zh_abstract: 文化对经济结果的影响在经济学家中已不再有争议，尽管它在经济学的许多领域仍被广泛忽视。本文探讨了一个不同的问题：文化为何会变迁？这里采用的基本前提是，文化因激励变化而变迁，从而改变行动和信念。随后进行了一项独特的文献回顾，说明环境（例如病原体的流行或土地对畜牧业的适宜性）和历史经验（例如殖民、战争或移民）如何影响社会中的权力关系并塑造人们的信念。接着考察了新信息和思想（即学习）的作用，最后探讨了政策在塑造激励和改变文化中的作用。论文的第二部分回顾了更明确地建模文化变迁机制的研究，使用定量模型考察经济激励与不断演变的信念或偏好之间的相互作用，并研究中介机制的重要性。鉴于过去150年中最深刻的文化和经济转型之一涉及性别角色，这一主题贯穿全文。

34076.title: Opting Out of Centralized Collective Bargaining: Evidence from Italy
34076.zh_title: 退出集中式集体谈判：来自意大利的证据
34076.authors: Christian Dustmann, Chiara Giannetto, Lorenzo Incoronato, Chiara Lacava, Vincenzo Pezone, Raffaele Saggio, Benjamin Schoefer
34076.abstract: This paper presents micro-empirical evidence on the effects of wage-setting decentralization. Our setting is Italy, where employers are required to comply with occupation- and industry-specific wage floors set by national collective bargaining agreements. We show that opting out of these agreements reduces wages but increases workers’ employment and retention within firms. These effects are most pronounced in the more productive North, where the overall impact on workers’ earnings is slightly positive. In contrast, in the South, wage losses outweigh employment gains, leading to a net decline in earnings. We also find that increased wage-setting flexibility is associated with higher firm survival rates in both regions. The regional divergence in outcomes aligns with a monopsony framework in which productivity and labor supply elasticities vary spatially.
34076.zh_abstract: 本文提供了关于工资设定分散化影响的微观实证证据。我们的研究背景是意大利，雇主必须遵守全国性集体谈判协议设定的职业和行业特定工资下限。我们表明，退出这些协议会降低工资，但会增加工人就业和留在企业内的可能性。这些效应在生产力更高的北部最为显著，在那里对工人收入的总体影响略为正。相反，在南部，工资损失超过了就业收益，导致收入净下降。我们还发现，工资设定灵活性的提高与两个地区企业存活率的上升相关。区域结果的差异与一个假设劳动力供给弹性随生产力空间变化的买方垄断框架相一致。
34076.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE；JEL：E02, E24, J0, J3, J5, J6

34075.title: Unpacking Aggregate Welfare in a Spatial Economy
34075.zh_title: 解析空间经济中的总福利
34075.authors: Eric Donald, Masao Fukui, Yuhei Miyauchi
34075.abstract: How do regional productivity shocks or transportation infrastructure improvements affect aggregate welfare? In a general class of spatial equilibrium models, we provide a formula for aggregate welfare changes, decomposed into terms associated with (i) technology (Fogel 1964, Hulten 1978), (ii) spatial dispersion of marginal utility, (iii) fiscal externalities, (iv) technological externalities, and (v) redistribution. We further use this decomposition to derive a general formula for optimal spatial transfers and show that, whenever optimal transfers are in place, the technology term alone captures the aggregate welfare effects of technological shocks. We apply our framework to study welfare gains from improving the US highway network. We find that changes in the spatial dispersion of marginal utility are as important as technological externalities in accounting for the deviations from the Fogel-Hulten benchmark to assess welfare gains.
34075.zh_abstract: 区域生产率冲击或交通基础设施改善如何影响总福利？在一类通用的空间均衡模型中，我们提供了一个总福利变化的公式，分解为与以下各项相关的项：(i) 技术（Fogel 1964, Hulten 1978），(ii) 边际效用的空间分散，(iii) 财政外部性，(iv) 技术外部性，以及 (v) 再分配。我们进一步利用这一分解推导出最优空间转移的一般公式，并表明，只要最优转移到位，技术项本身就能捕捉技术冲击的总福利效应。我们将框架应用于研究改善美国高速公路网络的福利收益。我们发现，在评估福利收益时，边际效用空间分散的变化与技术外部性在解释与Fogel-Hulten基准的偏差方面同等重要。

34074.title: Mobilizing Green Support through Digital Technology
34074.zh_title: 通过数字技术动员绿色支持
34074.authors: Jiayin Hu, Shang-Jin Wei, Jianwei Xing, Eric Zou
34074.abstract: A central challenge in the climate crisis is how to mobilize collective action—and who can do it. We show that digital platforms can transform latent support for sustainability into measurable environmental outcomes, while also generating value for the platform itself. We study Ant Forest, a program embedded in Alipay, China’s leading fintech app, which rewards users’ low-carbon behaviors with game points redeemable for planting real trees in arid regions of the country. Since its launch in 2016, the program has engaged over 700 million users and funded the planting of 500 million trees. Using user-level data, we find that participation is significantly higher in cities that have experienced faster vegetation growth. We propose a “green experience” mechanism: visible environmental improvement fosters greater appreciation for nature and increases support for sustainability efforts elsewhere. Survey evidence supports this mechanism, with participants also citing gamification and warm glow as key motivators. We further document spillover effects: Ant Forest participation boosts donations to external environmental projects and increases overall use of the Alipay app. These findings highlight the potential of digital platforms to scale climate action while creating shared environmental and economic value.
34074.zh_abstract: 气候危机中的一个核心挑战是如何动员集体行动——以及谁能够做到这一点。我们证明，数字平台可以将对可持续性的潜在支持转化为可衡量的环境成果，同时为平台本身创造价值。我们研究了蚂蚁森林，这是一个嵌入在中国领先的金融科技应用支付宝中的项目，它用游戏积分奖励用户的低碳行为，这些积分可用于在中国干旱地区种植真树。自2016年启动以来，该项目已吸引超过7亿用户参与，并资助种植了5亿棵树。利用用户层面数据，我们发现，在植被增长较快的城市，参与率显著更高。我们提出了一种“绿色体验”机制：可见的环境改善培养了对自然更大的欣赏，并增加了对其他地方可持续性努力的支持。调查证据支持这一机制，参与者还指出游戏化和“温暖的光辉”是主要动机。我们进一步记录了溢出效应：参与蚂蚁森林增加了对外部环境项目的捐赠，并提高了支付宝应用的整体使用率。这些发现凸显了数字平台在扩大气候行动规模的同时创造共享环境和经济价值的潜力。

34073.title: Accounting for Global Supply Chains: An Integrated Framework That Incorporates Foreign Invested Firms
34073.zh_title: 核算全球供应链：一个纳入外资企业的综合框架
34073.authors: Zhi Wang, Shang-Jin Wei, Xinding Yu, Kunfu Zhu
34073.abstract: This paper proposes a new unified accounting framework to measure Global Supply Chain (GSC) activities. It integrates decomposition frameworks on gross output, trade, and value added, and formally incorporates the role of Foreign Invested Enterprises (FIEs). Compared to the existing Global Value Chain (GVC) metrics that do not distinguish FIEs from domestic firms, the estimate of GSC activities in our approach is three times as large. The key contributions of our approach are: (1) distinguishing GSC activities based on their positions along production chains (upstream, downstream, or both) and mode of engagement (trade, FDI, or both); (2) extending Vertical Specialization (VS) measures to domestic supply chains, bridging trade-only and production-based analyses; and (3) reconciling net and gross decompositions to provide a comprehensive view of GSC participation and exposures.
34073.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个新的统一核算框架来衡量全球供应链活动。它整合了关于总产出、贸易和增加值的分解框架，并正式纳入了外商投资企业的作用。与现有不区分外资企业和国内企业的全球价值链指标相比，我们方法中对全球供应链活动的估计是其三倍。我们方法的关键贡献在于：(1) 根据全球供应链活动在生产链上的位置（上游、下游或两者兼有）以及参与模式（贸易、外国直接投资或两者兼有）进行区分；(2) 将垂直专业化衡量扩展到国内供应链，桥接了纯贸易分析和基于生产的分析；(3) 调和净额分解与总额分解，以提供全球供应链参与和暴露度的全面视图。

34072.title: What Does Consulting Do?
34072.authors: Gert Bijnens, Simon Jäger, Benjamin Schoefer
34072.abstract: This paper provides the first systematic and comprehensive empirical study of management and strategy consulting. We unveil the workings of this opaque industry by drawing on universal administrative business-to-business transaction data based on value-added tax links from Belgium (2002-2023). These data permit us to document the nature of consulting engagements, take-up patterns, and the effects on client firms. We document that consulting take-up is concentrated among large, high-labor-productivity firms. For TFP and profitability, we find a U-shaped pattern: both high and low performers hire consultants. New clients spend on average 3% of payroll on consulting, typically in episodic engagements lasting less than one year. Using difference-in-differences designs exploiting these sharp consulting events, we find positive effects on labor productivity of 3.6% over five years, driven by modest employment reductions alongside stable or growing revenue. Average wages rise by 2.7% with no decline in labor’s share of value added, suggesting productivity gains do not come at workers’ expense through rent-shifting. We do observe organizational restructuring with small increases in dismissal rates, and higher services procurement but reduced labor outsourcing. Our heterogeneity analysis reveals larger productivity gains for initially less productive firms, suggesting improvements in allocative efficiency. Our findings broadly align with ex-ante predictions from surveyed academic economists and consulting professionals, validating the productivity-enhancing view of consulting endorsed by most practitioners though only half of academics, while lending less support to a rent-shifting view favored by many economists.
34072.zh_abstract: 本文提供了对管理和战略咨询业的首次系统且全面的实证研究。我们通过利用基于比利时增值税链接的通用行政企业对企业交易数据（2002-2023年），揭示了这一不透明行业的运作方式。这些数据使我们能够记录咨询业务的性质、采纳模式以及对客户公司的影响。我们记录了咨询采纳集中在大型、高劳动生产率的企业中。对于全要素生产率和盈利能力，我们发现了一个U型模式：高绩效和低绩效企业都会聘请顾问。新客户平均将工资总额的3%用于咨询，通常是在持续不到一年的偶发性业务中。利用利用这些急剧咨询事件的双重差分设计，我们发现五年内劳动生产率有3.6%的正面影响，这是由适度的就业减少以及稳定或增长的收入驱动的。平均工资上涨了2.7%，而劳动在增加值中的份额没有下降，这表明生产率的提高并非通过租金转移以牺牲工人利益为代价。我们确实观察到组织重组，解雇率略有上升，服务采购增加但劳动力外包减少。我们的异质性分析显示，最初生产率较低的企业获得了更大的生产率提升，这表明配置效率有所改善。我们的发现与受访学术经济学家和咨询专业人士的事前预测大致一致，验证了大多数从业者（尽管只有一半的学者）认可的咨询提升生产率的观点，同时对许多经济学家偏好的租金转移观点支持较少。
34072.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IO, LS, PR；JEL：E20, E22, E23, J0, L2, M0, O4

34071.title: Rising Young Worker Despair in the United States
34071.zh_title: 美国年轻工人绝望情绪上升
34071.abstract: Between the early 1990s and 2015 the relationship between mental despair and age was hump-shaped in the United States: it rose to middle-age, then declined later in life. That relationship has now changed: mental despair declines monotonically with age due to a rise in despair among the young. However, the relationship between age and mental despair differs by labor market status. The hump-shape in age still exists for those who are unable to work and the unemployed. The relation between mental despair and age is broadly flat, and has remained so, for homemakers, students and the retired. The change in the age-despair profile over time is due to increasing despair among young workers. Whilst the relationship between mental despair and age has always been downward sloping among workers, this relationship has become more pronounced due to a rise in mental despair among young workers. We find broad-based evidence for this finding in the Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System (BRFSS) of 1993-2023, the National Survey on Drug Use and Health (NSDUH), 2008-2023, and in surveys by Pew, the Conference Board and Johns Hopkins University.
34071.zh_abstract: 在20世纪90年代初至2015年间，美国精神绝望与年龄之间的关系呈驼峰形：在中年达到顶峰，随后在晚年下降。这种关系现在已经改变：精神绝望随年龄单调递减，这是由于年轻人中绝望情绪的上升。然而，年龄与精神绝望之间的关系因劳动力市场状况而异。对于无法工作的人和失业者来说，年龄的驼峰形仍然存在。对于家庭主妇、学生和退休人员来说，精神绝望与年龄之间的关系大致平坦，并且一直如此。年龄-绝望曲线随时间的变化是由于年轻工人中绝望情绪的增加。虽然精神绝望与年龄之间的关系在工人中一直是向下倾斜的，但由于年轻工人中精神绝望的上升，这种关系变得更加明显。我们在1993-2023年的行为风险因素监测系统、2008-2023年的全国药物使用与健康调查，以及皮尤、世界大型企业联合会和约翰霍普金斯大学的调查中，为这一发现找到了广泛的证据。

34070.title: Algorithmic Coercion with Faster Pricing
34070.zh_title: 更快定价下的算法胁迫
34070.abstract: We study price competition when one firm uses a pricing algorithm that can react quickly to a rival’s price. We characterize a coercive equilibrium in which the algorithm encodes a persistent rule that maximizes discounted profits subject to the rival’s incentive compatibility constraint. The combination of faster pricing and multi-period commitment allows the algorithmic firm to unilaterally induce supracompetitive prices even when the rival is myopic and cannot sustain collusion. The algorithmic firm can earn more than its full collusion profits, and consumer surplus can fall below the full collusion benchmark. When the rival uses a learning rule to set prices, we show via simulations that outcomes rapidly converge to the coercive equilibrium. Finally, we demonstrate the implications of our framework for platform design.
34070.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一家使用能对竞争对手价格快速反应的定价算法时的价格竞争。我们刻画了一个胁迫均衡，其中算法编码了一个持久规则，该规则在满足竞争对手激励相容约束的条件下最大化折现利润。更快定价与多期承诺的结合，使得算法公司能够单方面诱导出超竞争价格，即使竞争对手是短视的且无法维持合谋。算法公司可以赚取超过其完全合谋利润的收益，而消费者剩余可能降至完全合谋基准以下。当竞争对手使用学习规则设定价格时，我们通过模拟显示结果迅速收敛到胁迫均衡。最后，我们展示了我们的框架对平台设计的启示。

34069.title: Cumulative Risks of Foster Care Placement for U.S. Children: Evidence from Birth Cohort and Synthetic Cohort Approaches
34069.zh_title: 美国儿童寄养安置的累积风险：来自出生队列和合成队列方法的证据
34069.authors: Joseph J. Doyle Jr., Natalia Emanuel, Raimundo Eyzaguirre
34069.abstract:
Background: Foster care placement is a far-reaching intervention that can have substantial long-term effects on children and families. Commonly cited lifetime prevalence estimates are based on synthetic cohort life tables, which rely on a stationarity assumption that age-specific rates are stable over time.
Objective: To estimate lifetime prevalence of foster care placement using a birth cohort life table approach, compare it to synthetic cohort estimates, and explore heterogeneity and dynamics in placement. 
Participants and Setting: U.S. children born between 2000 and 2002.
Methods: We estimate lifetime prevalence for the 2000-2002 birth cohorts using a birth cohort life table approach. These cohorts are observed through age 18, allowing estimation of placement using uncensored childhood spells. 
Results: Using the birth-cohort approach, an estimated 5.0% of children born between 2000 and 2002 experienced foster care placement by age 18. Risks varied substantially by ethnoracial group (Asian/Pacific Islander: 1.6%; Black: 10.0%; Native American: 12.0%; White: 3.9%). Synthetic-cohort estimates exceeded birth-cohort estimates by 16.7% (an absolute difference of 0.8–0.9 percentage points), with the largest differences at older ages and for placements attributed to child behavioral problems, non-kin family foster care, and congregate care. Substantial interstate heterogeneity was also observed. 
Conclusions: Birth cohort estimates indicate that 5% of children in the U.S. born between 2000 and 2002 were placed in foster care over their childhoods; synthetic cohort estimates are somewhat higher but are qualitatively similar. Comparisons of the two methods shed light on the changes in the use of different types of foster care over time and across geographies.
34069.zh_abstract: 背景：寄养安置是一项影响深远的干预措施，可能对儿童和家庭产生重大的长期影响。常被引用的终生患病率估计基于合成队列生命表，这依赖于年龄别率随时间稳定的平稳性假设。

34068.title: The Time Cost of a Disability
34068.abstract: We consider how a physical disability alters patterns of time use. A disability may raise the time cost of all activities; of some—making them differentially less worth doing; or it may make switching activities more costly. The first yields no predictions about time use, but the latter two possibilities both predict that fewer activities will be undertaken, with more time spent on each. These explanations describe our findings based on non-working ATUS 2008-22 respondents ages 70+, 32 percent of whom self-assess a disability. Data from the Polish Time Use Survey, where disability is medically certified, show similar results; and they demonstrate the same loss of variety over multiple days. Remarkably similar basic results are found using homogenized British, Canadian, French, Spanish, and Italian time-diaries. Overall, a mobility/physical disability leads an otherwise identical person to engage in over 10 percent fewer activities on a typical day. The lost variety represents extra costs equivalent in data from six countries to over twice the average annual income among older individuals in the country.
34068.zh_abstract: 我们考虑身体残疾如何改变时间使用模式。残疾可能会增加所有活动的时间成本；或者增加某些活动的时间成本——使它们相对更不值得去做；或者可能增加活动转换的成本。第一种情况对时间使用没有预测，但后两种可能性都预测会进行更少的活动，而花在每项活动上的时间更多。这些解释描述了我们的发现，这些发现基于2008-22年美国时间使用调查中70岁及以上的非工作受访者，其中32%自我评估有残疾。来自波兰时间使用调查的数据（其中残疾经过医学认证）显示了类似的结果；并且它们证明了在多天内同样缺乏多样性。使用同质化的英国、加拿大、法国、西班牙和意大利时间日记，发现了显著相似的基本结果。总体而言，行动/身体残疾导致一个在其他方面相同的人在典型的一天中参与的活动减少10%以上。失去的多样性代表了额外的成本，在六个国家的数据中，相当于该国老年人平均年收入的两倍以上。

34067.title: Multinational Firms and Cross-Border Mergers: Theory and Evidence
34067.zh_title: 跨国公司与跨境并购：理论与证据
34067.abstract: Multinational firms play a pivotal role in the global economy, yet economic and finance research has largely examined them in isolation. Economic theory focuses on trade and multinational activity but gives relatively little attention to cross-border mergers, while finance research emphasizes empirical studies of mergers but rarely integrates broader economic theories. This chapter aims to synthesize these two literatures into a unified framework for understanding multinational firms and cross-border mergers. The discussion is organized around the decision-making process of multinational firms, from choosing to operate internationally to selecting between greenfield investment and mergers. This framework reveals the theoretical and empirical evidence on the drivers of multinational production, including productivity gains, knowledge transfers, and market frictions. The findings highlight the commonality between the two literatures, but also suggests that greater integration between economic theory and finance research will generate a deeper understanding of the role of multinational firms in the global economy.
34067.zh_abstract: 跨国公司在全球经济中扮演着关键角色，然而经济学和金融学研究在很大程度上是孤立地审视它们。经济学理论侧重于贸易和跨国活动，但对跨境并购的关注相对较少，而金融学研究则强调对并购的实证研究，但很少整合更广泛的经济理论。本章旨在将这两类文献综合成一个统一的框架，以理解跨国公司和跨境并购。讨论围绕跨国公司的决策过程展开，从选择国际化经营到在绿地投资和并购之间进行选择。这一框架揭示了关于跨国生产驱动因素的理论和实证证据，包括生产率提升、知识转移和市场摩擦。研究结果凸显了这两类文献之间的共性，但也表明，经济理论与金融研究之间更大的整合将有助于更深入地理解跨国公司在全球经济中的作用。
34067.meta: Programs：CF, ITI；JEL：F10, F12, F14, F23, G34, G41, L41, L44, O32

34066.title: Digital Economy, Stablecoins, and the Global Financial System
34066.zh_title: 数字经济、稳定币与全球金融体系
34066.abstract: The rise of the Digital Economy has the potential to reshape international financial markets and the role of traditional reserve assets such as the US dollar. While the creation of Stablecoins may increase the demand for safe dollar-denominated instruments due to reserve backing requirements, they may also serve as substitutes, reducing the global demand for traditional reserve assets. We develop a multicountry model featuring the US, the rest of the world, and a distinct Digital Economy to quantify the impact of the potential expansion of the digital economy. Our results show that, in the long run, the reserve demand effect dominates the substitution effect, leading to lower US interest rates and greater US foreign borrowing. We also find that the expansion of the Digital Economy increases idiosyncratic consumption volatility in the US, while reducing it in the rest of the world.
34066.zh_abstract: 数字经济的崛起有可能重塑国际金融市场以及美元等传统储备资产的角色。虽然稳定币的创建可能因储备金支持要求而增加对安全美元计价工具的需求，但它们也可能作为替代品，减少全球对传统储备资产的需求。我们建立了一个包含美国、世界其他地区和独立数字经济体的多国模型，以量化数字经济潜在扩张的影响。我们的结果表明，长期来看，储备需求效应主导了替代效应，导致美国利率降低和外国借款增加。我们还发现，数字经济的扩张增加了美国特有的消费波动性，同时降低了世界其他地区的消费波动性。

34065.title: Flexible Data Centers and the Grid: Lower Costs, Higher Emissions?
34065.zh_title: 灵活的数据中心与电网：更低的成本，更高的排放？
34065.authors: Christopher R. Knittel, Juan Ramon L. Senga, Shen Wang
34065.abstract: Data centers are among the fastest-growing electricity consumers, raising concerns about their impact on grid operations and decarbonization goals. Their temporal flexibility—the ability to shift workloads over time—offers a source of demand-side flexibility. We model power systems in three U.S. regions: Mid-Atlantic, Texas, and WECC, under varying flexibility levels. We evaluate flexibility's effects on grid operations, investment, system costs, and emissions. Across all scenarios, flexible data centers reduce costs by shifting load from peak to off-peak hours, flattening net demand, and supporting renewable and baseload resources. This load shifting facilitates renewable integration while improving the utilization of existing baseload capacity. As a result, the emissions impact depends on which effect dominates. Higher renewable penetration increases the emissions-reduction potential of data center flexibility, while lower shares favor baseload generation and may raise emissions. Our findings highlight the importance of aligning data center flexibility with renewable deployment and regional conditions.
34065.zh_abstract: 数据中心是增长最快的电力消费者之一，引发了对其对电网运营和脱碳目标影响的担忧。其时间灵活性——即随时间推移转移工作负载的能力——提供了需求侧灵活性的来源。我们模拟了美国三个地区（中大西洋、德克萨斯和WECC）在不同灵活性水平下的电力系统。我们评估了灵活性对电网运营、投资、系统成本和排放的影响。在所有情景下，灵活的数据中心通过将负荷从高峰时段转移到非高峰时段、平抑净需求以及支持可再生能源和基荷资源来降低成本。这种负荷转移促进了可再生能源的整合，同时提高了现有基荷容量的利用率。因此，排放影响取决于哪种效应占主导。更高的可再生能源渗透率增加了数据中心灵活性的减排潜力，而较低的份额则有利于基荷发电，并可能增加排放。我们的发现强调了将数据中心灵活性与可再生能源部署和区域条件相结合的重要性。
34065.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, PR；JEL：D61, L94, Q41, Q48

34064.title: The Impact of a Child with Down Syndrome
34064.zh_title: 唐氏综合症儿童的影响
34064.authors: Liran Einav, Amy Finkelstein, Petra Persson
34064.abstract: We characterize the causal impact of having a child with Down syndrome relative to having one without Down syndrome using event studies around birth and population-wide Swedish administrative data from 1990 to 2019. The incremental effect of having a child with Down syndrome is to increase the likelihood of parental co-habitation and subsequent child-bearing. These effects exist both in an environment with essentially no prenatal testing – where the birth of a child with Down syndrome is random conditional on maternal age – as well as once prenatal screening and testing is more common. In both contexts, total income also increases due to the presence of a generous allowance for families with a child with a disability, but the impact on labor earnings differs. In the “no-testing” environment, having a child with Down syndrome leads to a greater decrease in maternal earnings post-birth relative to having a child without Down syndrome, but this effect reverses sign once testing is available. Our results speak to the impact on families of a child with Down syndrome in a setting where families are largely insured against any additional financial costs.
34064.zh_abstract: 我们利用1990年至2019年瑞典全人口行政数据，围绕出生事件进行研究，刻画了生育唐氏综合症儿童相对于生育非唐氏综合症儿童的因果影响。生育唐氏综合症儿童的增量效应是增加了父母同居和后续生育的可能性。这些效应既存在于基本没有产前检测的环境中——在该环境中，唐氏综合症儿童的出生在母亲年龄条件下是随机的——也存在于产前筛查和检测更为普遍的环境中。在这两种背景下，由于为有残疾儿童的家庭提供慷慨的津贴，总收入也有所增加，但对劳动收入的影响有所不同。在“无检测”环境中，相对于生育非唐氏综合症儿童，生育唐氏综合症儿童导致母亲产后收入下降幅度更大，但一旦检测可用，这种效应符号反转。我们的结果揭示了在家庭基本免受额外财务成本影响的环境中，唐氏综合症儿童对家庭的影响。

34098.title: Rural-Urban Migration and Market Integration
34098.authors: Dennis Egger, Benjamin Faber, Ming Li, Wei Lin
34098.abstract: We combine a new collection of microdata from China with a natural policy experiment to investigate the extent to which reductions in rural-urban migration barriers affect flows of trade and investments between cities and the countryside. We find that increases in worker eligibility for urban residence registration (Hukou) across origin-destination pairs increase rural-urban exports, imports, capital inflows and outflows, both in terms of bilateral transaction values and the number of unique buyer-seller matches. To quantify the implications at the regional level, we interpret these estimates through the lens of a spatial equilibrium model in which migrants can reduce buyer-seller matching frictions. We find that a 10% increase in a rural county's migration market access on average leads to a 1.5% increase in the county's trade market access and a 2% increase in investment market access. In the context of China's recent Hukou reforms, we find that these knock-on effects on market integration were on average larger among the urban destinations compared to the rural origins, reinforcing incentives for rural-urban migration.
34098.zh_abstract: 我们结合中国新的微观数据集合与一项自然政策实验，研究降低城乡迁移壁垒在多大程度上影响城乡之间的贸易和投资流动。我们发现，在来源地-目的地配对中，工人获得城市户籍资格的提升会增加城乡之间的出口、进口、资本流入和流出，这既体现在双边交易价值上，也体现在独特的买卖双方匹配数量上。为了在区域层面量化其影响，我们通过一个空间均衡模型来解读这些估计结果，在该模型中，移民可以减少买卖双方的匹配摩擦。我们发现，一个农村县的迁移市场准入每增加10%，平均会导致该县的贸易市场准入增加1.5%，投资市场准入增加2%。在中国最近的户籍改革背景下，我们发现这些对市场整合的连锁效应在城市目的地平均大于农村来源地，从而强化了城乡迁移的激励。

34097.title: The Undoing of Economic Sanctions: Evidence from the Russia-Ukraine Conflict
34097.zh_title: 经济制裁的失效：来自俄乌冲突的证据
34097.authors: Raymond Fisman, Giovanna Marcolongo, Meng Wu
34097.abstract: We examine the effects of Ukraine’s economic blockade of the anthracite-rich Donbas region, to demonstrate how trade sanctions’ efficacy can be undermined by trade through non-participatory nations. We document that after the blockade was imposed in March 2017, Russia reported a sharp increase in anthracite imports from Ukraine, while Ukraine reported no exports to Russia at all. We interpret this gap in “mirror statistics” as reflecting a shift in Donbas trade through Russia. Concurrently, Ukraine anthracite imports from Russia increased sharply (from near-zero), indicating that some of the increased supply of anthracite in Russia was exported back to Ukraine. We provide suggestive evidence that Russian traders benefited from monopsony rents, buying low-priced anthracite from Donbas while Russia sold anthracite to Ukraine at prices comparable to other export markets. Overall, our findings highlight some of the economic and geographic features that may raise the cost and limit the efficacy of sanctions.
34097.zh_abstract: 我们考察了乌克兰对富含无烟煤的顿巴斯地区实施经济封锁的影响，以展示贸易制裁的有效性如何因通过非参与国的贸易而受到削弱。我们记录到，在2017年3月实施封锁后，俄罗斯报告从乌克兰进口的无烟煤急剧增加，而乌克兰报告对俄罗斯的出口为零。我们将这种“镜像统计”中的差距解释为反映了顿巴斯贸易通过俄罗斯的转移。与此同时，乌克兰从俄罗斯进口的无烟煤急剧增加（从接近零的水平），表明俄罗斯增加的某些无烟煤供应被重新出口回乌克兰。我们提供了暗示性证据，表明俄罗斯贸易商从买方垄断租金中获益，以低价从顿巴斯购买无烟煤，同时俄罗斯以与其他出口市场相当的价格向乌克兰出售无烟煤。总体而言，我们的发现突显了可能提高制裁成本并限制其有效性的一些经济和地理特征。

34096.title: Transport Infrastructure and Policy Evaluation
34096.zh_title: 交通基础设施与政策评估
34096.abstract: How beneficial are transport infrastructure investments and other transport policies? This chapter develops a framework whose goal is to survey and synthesize the answers that regional and urban economists have given to this question. Emphasis is placed on theoretical results about sufficient statistics that capture approximate impacts in both distorted and undistorted economies, as well as how new advances in data collection and causal inference are poised to leverage these theoretical results and thereby modernize and extend standard templates for infrastructure and policy evaluation. The chapter concludes with discussions of optimal policy, political economy, and practical matters of infrastructure provision.
34096.zh_abstract: 交通基础设施投资和其他交通政策有多大益处？本章构建了一个框架，旨在调查和综合区域与城市经济学家对此问题的回答。重点放在关于充分统计量的理论结果上，这些统计量捕捉了在扭曲和非扭曲经济中的近似影响，以及数据收集和因果推断的新进展如何准备利用这些理论结果，从而现代化并扩展基础设施和政策评估的标准模板。本章以对最优政策、政治经济学以及基础设施供给实际问题的讨论作为结尾。

34095.title: Reskilling and Resilience
34095.abstract: This paper shows that effective reskilling can have profound mental health benefits for workers and their partners. Using institutional variation in access to higher education after work accidents in Denmark, we find that reskilling prevents one case of depression for every three injured workers. Strikingly, the spillover effects on partners are just as large. These mental health gains are accompanied by higher partner employment and increased separation rates, suggesting that reskilling frees partners from costly relationship commitments. Together, the mental health and partner benefits add 83% to the direct labor earnings gains from reskilling.
34095.zh_abstract: 本文表明，有效的技能重塑可以为工人及其伴侣带来深远的心理健康益处。利用丹麦工伤事故后接受高等教育机会的制度差异，我们发现，每三名受伤工人中，技能重塑就能预防一例抑郁症。引人注目的是，对伴侣的溢出效应同样巨大。这些心理健康收益伴随着伴侣就业率的提高和分居率的上升，表明技能重塑使伴侣摆脱了代价高昂的关系承诺。总体而言，心理健康和伴侣方面的收益使技能重塑的直接劳动收入收益增加了83%。
34095.meta: Programs：AG, CH, ED, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I18, I26, I31, J12, J24

34094.title: Feeling Rich or Looking Rich? Quantifying Self-Image and Social-Image Motives
34094.zh_title: 感觉富有还是看起来富有？量化自我形象与社会形象动机
34094.authors: Nicolas L. Bottan, Ricardo Perez-Truglia, Hitoshi Shigeoka, Katsunori Yamada
34094.abstract: Preferences for status are typically attributed to two distinct channels: self-image, in which individuals derive utility from being richer than others, and social-image, in which individuals value being seen as richer by others. While both channels are believed to be at play, little is known about their relative importance. We address this gap using a hypothetical discrete choice experiment. Our findings indicate that self-image is at most 19.3% as important as social-image. Additionally, we document substantial heterogeneity in the strength of these preferences across individuals and domains.
34094.zh_abstract: 对地位的偏好通常归因于两个不同的渠道：自我形象，即个体从比别人更富有中获得效用；以及社会形象，即个体重视被别人视为更富有。虽然这两个渠道都被认为在起作用，但关于它们的相对重要性知之甚少。我们通过一个假设的离散选择实验来填补这一空白。我们的发现表明，自我形象的重要性最多只有社会形象的19.3%。此外，我们记录了这些偏好的强度在个体和领域之间存在显著的异质性。

34093.title: The Personalist Penalty: Varieties of Autocracy and Economic Growth
34093.zh_title: 人格主义惩罚：威权主义的多样性及经济增长
34093.authors: Christopher Blattman, Scott Gehlbach, Zeyang Yu
34093.abstract: Studies of income and regime type typically contrast democracies and autocracies, ignoring heterogeneity in the character of authoritarian regimes. We focus on the consequences of personalist rule, where power is concentrated in an individual or small elite. Extending the dynamic panel strategy of Acemoglu, Naidu, Restrepo, and Robinson (2019), we estimate the differential growth performance of democracies, institutionalized autocracies, and personalist autocracies. Across eight GDP series, eight autocracy codings, and six measures of personalism, we observe a consistent pattern: Whenever an “autocratic penalty” emerges, it is concentrated in personalist regimes. The growth performance of institutionalized dictatorships, in contrast, is statistically indistinguishable from that of democracies. We document evidence that the “personalist penalty” is driven by some combination of low private investment, poor public-goods provision, and conflict. These findings emphasize the analytic payoff of unpacking autocracy and highlight the different incentives facing leaders with narrow and broad bases of power.
34093.zh_abstract: 关于收入和政体类型的研究通常对比民主政体和威权政体，忽略了威权政权特征的异质性。我们聚焦于人格主义统治的后果，在这种统治下，权力集中于个人或小精英手中。通过扩展Acemoglu、Naidu、Restrepo和Robinson（2019）的动态面板策略，我们估计了民主政体、制度化威权政体和人格主义威权政体的不同增长表现。在八个GDP序列、八个威权政体编码和六个人格主义衡量指标中，我们观察到一个一致的模式：每当出现“威权惩罚”时，它都集中在人格主义政权中。相比之下，制度化独裁政体的增长表现在统计上与民主政体无法区分。我们记录了证据表明，“人格主义惩罚”是由低私人投资、差公共品供给和冲突的某种组合驱动的。这些发现强调了剖析威权主义的分析价值，并突显了权力基础狭窄和广泛的领导者面临的不同激励。

34092.title: Attitudes to Debt: The Role of Moral Values
34092.zh_title: 债务态度：道德价值观的作用
34092.authors: Fiona Paine, Antoinette Schoar, David Thesmar
34092.abstract: This paper tests how people’s moral values influence their views of debt contracts. We ask participants to make decisions about debt contracts in different hypothetical situations (vignettes). We separately measure their moral values using the Moral Foundations Questionnaire (Graham et al., 2009). We have three main sets of findings. First, differences in moral values strongly explain the cross-section of participants’ debt decisions. Participants with more conservative values show more support for credit score-based loan pricing, stricter forms of collateral, and tougher bankruptcy resolution. Second, when we randomly change the economic costs and benefits of debt within our vignettes, we find that participants change their answers in the direction predicted by economic theory. Third, participants’ beliefs of the functioning of the credit market strongly correlate with their moral values. Participants with conservative values are more likely to believe that strict enforcement and risk-based loan pricing provide incentives and are economically efficient. More liberal participants believe that insurance against unlucky shocks are important. Consistent with moral values being distinct from Bayesian beliefs, financial literacy does not attenuate moral values in shaping beliefs about what is economically efficient.
34092.zh_abstract: 本文检验了人们的道德价值观如何影响他们对债务合同的看法。我们要求参与者在不同的假设情境（小插曲）中就债务合同做出决定。我们使用道德基础问卷（Graham et al., 2009）分别测量他们的道德价值观。我们有三组主要发现。首先，道德价值观的差异强烈解释了参与者债务决策的横截面差异。具有更保守价值观的参与者更支持基于信用评分的贷款定价、更严格的抵押形式以及更严厉的破产解决方案。其次，当我们在小插曲中随机改变债务的经济成本和收益时，我们发现参与者会按照经济理论预测的方向改变他们的答案。第三，参与者对信贷市场运作的信念与其道德价值观密切相关。具有保守价值观的参与者更倾向于相信严格执法和基于风险的贷款定价能提供激励且经济高效。更自由的参与者则认为对不幸冲击的保险很重要。与道德价值观不同于贝叶斯信念相一致，金融素养并不会削弱道德价值观在塑造关于经济效率信念方面的作用。

34091.title: Optimal School System and Curriculum Design: Theory and Evidence
34091.zh_title: 最优学校体系与课程设计：理论与证据
34091.abstract: This paper develops a model of education production and uses it to study optimal school system and curriculum design. Curriculum design is modeled as a time-allocation problem. A school teaches students many skills and allocates time to different skills based on student characteristics. Our framework provides a novel interpretation of studies that find zero achievement effects at selective school admission cutoffs. We show that such findings may be consistent with highly effective schools implementing optimal curricula, rather than necessarily indicating ineffective schools. The interpretation depends on the alignment between measured outcome skills and skills emphasized in the curriculum. We test several model predictions using data from a prominent exam school and find supporting evidence that would be difficult to rationalize if selective schools were ineffective.
34091.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个教育生产模型，并用它来研究最优学校体系和课程设计。课程设计被建模为一个时间分配问题。学校教授学生多种技能，并根据学生特征将时间分配给不同的技能。我们的框架为那些在选择性学校录取分数线处发现零成就效应的研究提供了一种新颖的解释。我们表明，这些发现可能与实施最优课程的高效学校相一致，而不一定意味着学校效率低下。这种解释取决于所测量的结果技能与课程中强调的技能之间的一致性。我们使用一所著名考试学校的数据检验了几个模型预测，并发现了支持性证据，如果选择性学校效率低下，这些证据将难以合理化。

34090.title: New Economic Forces Behind the Value Distribution of Innovation
34090.zh_title: 创新价值分配背后的新经济力量
34090.authors: Timothy F. Bresnahan, Shane Greenstein, Pai-Ling Yin
34090.abstract: Advances in a general-purpose technology (GPT) enable many firms to invent complementary inventions, or co-inventions, making the GPT more valuable. This study examines the empirical implications of a straightforward model in which firms choose either incremental or novel co-invention. Incremental co-inventors aspire to small gains at low costs and with less uncertainty. Novel co-inventors introduce new products or services with the potential for large returns, but do so at high costs and with uncertain outcomes. Similar firms investing in incremental co-invention will create value proportional to their existing business, a benchmark we illustrate with the experiences at local radio and newspapers. The study then examines the value of co-inventions for the World Wide Web and mobile ecosystems, focusing on success in 2013, using data from many sources. This data supports analysis comparing the incremental and novel regimes. The latter should display a distinctly different upper tail of the distribution of returns. We show that the value distributions for incremental and novel co-invention are far apart. Incremental co-invention is more widely distributed across regions, industries, and firms. Success from novel co-invention is rare, challenging, and the source of the largest value. In the aggregate, novel co-invention creates the most value, so the overall value distribution remains concentrated in a few industries, regions, and firms.
34090.zh_abstract: 通用目的技术（GPT）的进步使许多企业能够进行互补性发明（即共同发明），从而提升GPT的价值。本研究考察了一个简单模型的经验含义，在该模型中，企业选择渐进式或新颖式共同发明。渐进式共同发明者以低成本、低不确定性追求小收益。新颖式共同发明者推出新产品或服务，具有高回报潜力，但成本高且结果不确定。投资于渐进式共同发明的相似企业将创造与其现有业务成比例的价值，我们以地方广播和报纸的经验为例说明了这一基准。然后，本研究利用来自多个来源的数据，考察了万维网和移动生态系统中共同发明的价值，重点关注2013年的成功案例。这些数据支持对渐进式和新颖式制度进行比较分析。后者应显示出明显不同的回报分布上尾。我们表明，渐进式和新颖式共同发明的价值分布相差甚远。渐进式共同发明在区域、行业和企业中分布更广。新颖式共同发明的成功是罕见的、具有挑战性的，并且是最大价值的来源。总体而言，新颖式共同发明创造了最大价值，因此整体价值分布仍集中在少数行业、区域和企业中。
34090.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：L80, L86, M15, O31, O33

34089.title: An Informational Nudge to Shave Peak Demand
34089.zh_title: 削减峰值需求的信息助推
34089.abstract: Informational nudges to encourage energy conservation or load shifting have been tried in various contexts. This paper studies a program run by a small municipally owned electric utility to reduce demand on certain peak demand days. An email alert is sent out to residential customers who sign up for the alerts. Some recipients of those alerts forward the alerts to other customers or community groups, making it difficult to determine how broadly the alerts are disseminated. The alerts encourage load shifting and energy saving during specific hours on the following day. \nUsing hourly load data for the utility, I estimate the reduction in electricity load caused by the alert emails. Using an instrumental variables approach, estimates suggest that load is reduced by roughly 0.7 MWs per hour during the hours covered by the alert. This works out to a reduction in load on the order of 2 percent. I calculate the cost savings to the municipal utility and discuss social and private benefits of the program. The private benefits of the peak alert program swamp the social benefits.
34089.zh_abstract: 鼓励节能或负荷转移的信息助推已在多种情境下尝试过。本文研究了一家小型市政电力公司为减少特定峰值需求日的需求而运行的项目。向注册接收警报的居民客户发送电子邮件警报。部分警报接收者将警报转发给其他客户或社区团体，这使得难以确定警报的传播范围。这些警报鼓励在次日的特定时段内进行负荷转移和节能。利用该公用事业公司的每小时负荷数据，我估算了警报电子邮件导致的电力负荷减少量。使用工具变量方法，估计表明在警报覆盖的时段内，负荷每小时减少约0.7兆瓦。这相当于负荷减少约2%。我计算了该市政公用事业公司的成本节约，并讨论了该项目的私人和社会效益。该峰值警报项目的私人效益远超社会效益。

34088.title: The Causal Effect of News on Inflation Expectations
34088.zh_title: 新闻对通胀预期的因果效应
34088.authors: Carola Binder, Pascal Frank, Jane M. Ryngaert
34088.abstract: This paper studies the response of household inflation expectations to television news coverage of inflation. We analyze news data from CNN, Fox News, and MSNBC alongside a daily measure of inflation expectations. Using a local projection instrumental variables approach, we estimate the dynamic causal effect of inflation news coverage on household inflation expectations at a daily frequency. Increased media coverage of inflation raises expectations, with effects peaking within a few days and fading after approximately 10 days. Additionally, we document a key nonlinearity: release days with positive CPI surprises—i.e., inflation exceeding market expectations—lead to stronger expectation responses than release days with negative surprises.
34088.zh_abstract: 本文研究了家庭通胀预期对电视新闻中通胀报道的反应。我们分析了来自CNN、福克斯新闻和MSNBC的新闻数据，并结合每日通胀预期指标。使用局部投影工具变量方法，我们估算了通胀新闻报道对家庭通胀预期在日度频率上的动态因果效应。媒体对通胀报道的增加会推高预期，其影响在几天内达到峰值，并在大约10天后消退。此外，我们记录了一个关键的非线性特征：在发布日，当CPI意外上行（即通胀超出市场预期）时，预期反应比意外下行时更强。

34087.title: Campaigning for Extinction: Eradication of Sparrows and the Great Famine in China
34087.zh_title: 为灭绝而战：中国的麻雀消灭运动与大饥荒
34087.authors: Eyal G. Frank, Qinyun Wang, Shaoda Wang, Xuebin Wang, Yang You
34087.abstract: How do large disruptions to ecosystems affect human well-being? This paper tests the long-standing hypothesis that China's 1958 Four Pests Campaign, which exterminated sparrows despite scientists’ warnings about their pest-control role, exacerbated the Great Famine—the largest in human history. Combining newly digitized data on historical agricultural productivity in China with habitat suitability modeling methods in ecology, we find that, after sparrow eradication, a one-standard-deviation increase in sparrow suitability led to 5.3% larger rice and 8.7% larger wheat declines. State food procurement exacerbated these losses, resulting in a 9.6% higher mortality in high-suitability counties—implying nearly two million excess deaths.
34087.zh_abstract: 生态系统的巨大破坏如何影响人类福祉？本文检验了一个长期存在的假说：中国1958年的“除四害”运动（尽管科学家警告麻雀具有害虫控制作用，但仍将其消灭）加剧了大饥荒——人类历史上最大的饥荒。结合中国历史农业生产力新数字化数据与生态学中的栖息地适宜性建模方法，我们发现，在麻雀被消灭后，麻雀适宜性指数每增加一个标准差，会导致水稻产量下降5.3%，小麦产量下降8.7%。国家粮食征购加剧了这些损失，导致高适宜性县的死亡率高出9.6%——这意味着近两百万超额死亡。

34086.title: Retail Investors’ Contrarian Behavior Around News, Attention, and the Momentum Effect
34086.zh_title: 新闻、注意力与动量效应下散户投资者的反向交易行为
34086.authors: Patrick Luo, Enrichetta Ravina, Marco C. Sammon, Luis M. Viceira
34086.abstract: Using a large and representative panel of U.S. brokerage accounts, we show that retail investors trade as contrarians after large earnings surprises, especially for loser stocks, and that such contrarian trading contributes to price momentum and post earnings announcement drift (PEAD). We show that extreme return streaks and surprises are not enough for stocks to exhibit PEAD and momentum and that the intensity of contrarian retail trading plays a key role: the PEAD of loser stocks with bad earnings surprises becomes increasingly more negative as retail buying pressure increases, and he PEAD of the stocks with the highest past returns and largest earnings surprises is the most positive for the stocks with the biggest net retail outflow. Finer sorts confirm the results, as do sorts by firm size and institutional ownership level. Younger and more attentive individuals are more likely to be contrarian, and a firm’s dividend yield, leverage, size, book to market, and analyst coverage are associated with the fraction of contrarian trades they face around earnings announcements. The disposition effect and stale limit orders, while present in our sample, do not explain our results. Our findings are consistent with investors’ conservatism, sticky beliefs, and cognitive uncertainty, as well as an incorrect belief in the Law of Small Numbers.
34086.zh_abstract: 利用一个大型且具有代表性的美国经纪账户面板数据，我们表明散户投资者在重大盈利意外后倾向于反向交易，尤其是对于输家股票，并且这种反向交易有助于价格动量和盈利公告后漂移（PEAD）。我们表明，极端的回报序列和意外本身不足以使股票表现出PEAD和动量，散户反向交易的强度起着关键作用：对于盈利意外为负的输家股票，随着散户买入压力的增加，其PEAD变得越来越负；而对于过去回报最高且盈利意外最大的股票，其PEAD在散户净流出最大的股票中最为正向。更精细的分组以及按公司规模和机构持股水平的分组均证实了这些结果。更年轻、更专注的个人更可能进行反向交易，而公司的股息率、杠杆率、规模、账面市值比和分析师覆盖范围与盈利公告前后他们面临的反向交易比例相关。处置效应和过时限价订单虽然存在于我们的样本中，但不能解释我们的结果。我们的发现与投资者的保守主义、粘性信念和认知不确定性，以及对小数定律的错误信念相一致。
34086.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：G0, G11, G12, G4, G41, G5

34085.title: Entrepreneurial Experimentation Design for Venture Finance
34085.zh_title: 面向风险融资的创业实验设计
34085.abstract: This paper examines how entrepreneurs strategically design experiments to convince venture capitalists (VCs) to fund their projects when investors interpret data through heterogeneous statistical frameworks. Drawing on Liang (2021)'s model of games with incomplete information played by statistical learners, we translate her abstract theoretical framework into a practical venture capital setting. We characterise how entrepreneurs balance funding plausibility against equity dilution by strategically choosing experiments along two critical dimensions: sample size (precision) and dimensionality (breadth of metrics). Our analysis reveals that for genuinely high-quality projects, increased precision helps by forcing VC beliefs to converge toward true quality. For low-quality projects, funding depends on preserving disagreement through sparse, high-dimensional experiments. The entrepreneur's optimal design depends critically on their prior beliefs: confident entrepreneurs choose high-precision, low-dimensional experiments that minimise equity dilution, while uncertain entrepreneurs opt for sparse, high-dimensional experiments that maximise the probability some VC will hold sufficiently optimistic beliefs. The framework provides a rigorous foundation for understanding how entrepreneurs and investors can rationally disagree when observing identical evidence, with significant implications for strategic information design in entrepreneurial settings.
34085.zh_abstract: 本文考察了当投资者通过异质性统计框架解读数据时，企业家如何策略性地设计实验以说服风险投资家（VC）为其项目提供资金。借鉴Liang（2021）关于统计学习者参与的不完全信息博弈模型，我们将她的抽象理论框架转化为一个实际的风险投资环境。我们刻画了企业家如何通过策略性地选择实验的两个关键维度——样本量（精确度）和维度（指标广度）——来平衡融资可行性与股权稀释。我们的分析揭示，对于真正高质量的项目，提高精确度有助于迫使VC信念向真实质量收敛。对于低质量项目，融资取决于通过稀疏、高维实验来维持分歧。企业家的最优设计关键取决于其先验信念：自信的企业家选择高精确度、低维度的实验以最小化股权稀释，而不确定的企业家则选择稀疏、高维度的实验以最大化某些VC持有足够乐观信念的概率。该框架为理解企业家和投资者在观察相同证据时如何理性地产生分歧提供了严格基础，对创业环境中的策略性信息设计具有重要启示。

34084.title: International Climate News
34084.authors: María José Arteaga Garavito, Riccardo Colacito, Mariano Max Croce, Biao Yang
34084.abstract: We develop novel high-frequency indices that measure climate attention across a wide range of developed and emerging economies. By analyzing the text of over 23 million Tweets published by leading national newspapers, we find that a country experiencing more severe climate news shocks tends to see both an inflow of capital and an appreciation of its currency. In addition, brown stocks experience large and persistent negative returns after a global climate news shock if located in highly exposed countries. A risk-sharing model in which investors price climate news shocks and trade consumption and investment goods in global markets rationalizes these findings.
34084.zh_abstract: 我们开发了新颖的高频指数，用于衡量一系列发达经济体和新兴经济体的气候关注度。通过分析主要全国性报纸发布的超过2300万条推文的文本，我们发现，经历更严重气候新闻冲击的国家往往会出现资本流入和货币升值。此外，如果位于高暴露国家，棕色股票在全球气候新闻冲击后会出现巨大且持续的负回报。一个风险分担模型（其中投资者对气候新闻冲击进行定价，并在全球市场上交易消费品和投资品）合理化了这些发现。

34083.title: Strategic Complexity Promotes Egalitarianism in Legislative Bargaining
34083.zh_title: 策略复杂性促进立法谈判中的平等主义
34083.authors: Marina Agranov, S. Nageeb Ali, B. Douglas Bernheim, Thomas R. Palfrey
34083.abstract: Strategic models of legislative bargaining predict that proposers can extract high shares of economic surplus by identifying and exploiting weak coalition partners. However, strength and weakness can be difficult to assess even with relatively simple bargaining protocols. We evaluate experimentally how strategic complexity affects the ability to identify weak coalition partners, and for the partners themselves to determine whether their positions are weak or strong. We find that, as strategic complexity progressively obscures bargaining strength, proposers migrate to egalitarianism, in significant part because non-proposers begin placing substantial weight on fairness. Greater analytic skill dampens but does not eliminate these patterns.
34083.zh_abstract: 立法谈判的策略模型预测，提议者可以通过识别和利用弱势联盟伙伴来获取高额经济剩余份额。然而，即使谈判协议相对简单，强弱也难以评估。我们通过实验评估了策略复杂性如何影响识别弱势联盟伙伴的能力，以及伙伴自身判断其立场是弱还是强的能力。我们发现，随着策略复杂性逐渐模糊谈判实力，提议者转向平等主义，这在很大程度上是因为非提议者开始将公平置于重要地位。更强的分析能力抑制了但并未消除这些模式。

34099.title: When is Less More? Bank Arrangements for Liquidity vs Central Bank Support
34099.zh_title: 何时少即是多？银行流动性安排与央行支持
34099.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Raghuram Rajan, Zhi Quan (Bill) Shu
34099.abstract: Theory suggests that in the face of fire-sale externalities, banks have incentives to overinvest in order to issue cheap money-like deposit liabilities. The existence of a private market for insurance such as contingent capital can eliminate the overinvestment incentives, leading to efficient outcomes. However, it does not eliminate fire sales. A central bank that can infuse liquidity cheaply may be motivated to intervene in the face of fire sales. If so, it can crowd out the private market and, if liquidity intervention is not priced at higher-than-breakeven rates, induce overinvestment once again. We examine various forms of public intervention to identify the least distortionary ones. Our analysis suggests why private contingent capital dominated in the era preceding central banks and deposit insurance, why it waned subsequently, as well as why banking crises and speculative excesses continue to recur periodically.
34099.zh_abstract: 理论表明，面对抛售外部性，银行有过度投资的动机，以便发行廉价的类货币存款负债。私人保险市场（如或有资本）的存在可以消除过度投资激励，从而实现有效结果。然而，它并不能消除抛售。能够廉价注入流动性的央行可能有动机在面临抛售时进行干预。如果是这样，它可能会挤出私人市场，并且如果流动性干预不以高于盈亏平衡的利率定价，则会再次引发过度投资。我们考察了各种形式的公共干预，以找出扭曲最小的那些。我们的分析揭示了为什么私人或有资本在中央银行和存款保险出现之前的时代占据主导地位，为什么后来逐渐衰落，以及为什么银行危机和投机过度会周期性地反复出现。
34099.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E40, E41, E50, E58, G01, G2, G21, G23, G28, N20
